V021-N01759.label: 剂型
V021-N01759.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01759.definition: The form of a prepared medicine designed for medical treatment or prevention.

V021-N01759.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01759.label: 剂型
V021-N01759.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01759.label: 剂型
V021-N01759.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜剂型、煎服法
V021-N01759.definition: 将原料药加工制成适合于医疗或预防应用 的形式。

V021-N01759.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01759.label: 剂型
V021-N01759.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]
V021-N01759.definition: 指多种药剂的不同形式。

V021-N01759.label: 剂型
V021-N01759.definition: 指多种药剂的不同形式。

V021-N01856.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01856.label: 化湿药
V021-N01856.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01856.definition: Medicines that are aromatic in smell and dry in property. They mainly act to transform dampness and benefit the spleen. These medicines are indicated for dampness affecting the spleen and stomach.

V021-N01856.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01856.label: 化湿药
V021-N01856.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01856.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01856.label: 化湿药
V021-N01856.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类
V021-N01856.definition: 指气味芳香，性偏温燥，以化湿运脾为主要作用的药物。

V021-N01856.label: 化湿药
V021-N01856.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片

V021-N01857.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01857.label: 化瘀止血药
V021-N01857.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01857.definition: Medicines to stop bleeding and circulate blood to transform stasis. They act to stop bleeding but do not cause stasis; and circulate blood but do not cause bleeding. These medicines are indicated for haemorrhagic conditions due to stagnant blood or blood failing to circulate within the vessels.

V021-N01857.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01857.label: 化瘀止血药
V021-N01857.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜消食药｜驱虫药｜止血药

V021-N01857.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01857.label: 化瘀止血药
V021-N01857.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类｜理血药｜止血药（中药）
V021-N01857.definition: 指既能止血，又能化瘀，止血不留瘀，主治瘀血内阻，血不循经之出血病证的药物。

V021-N01857.label: 化瘀止血药
V021-N01857.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片｜理血药｜止血药

V021-N01859.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01859.label: 十九畏
V021-N01859.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01859.definition: One of the contraindicated combinations of Chinese medicines. These include: Liu Huang (sulfur) is incompatible with Pu Xiao (crude sodium sulfate), Shui Yin (mercury) with Pi Shuang (arsenic trioxide),Lang Du (Radix Euphorbiae Ebracteolatae) Mi Tuo Seng (litharge), Ba Dou (Semen Crotonis) with Qian Niu (Semen Pharbitidis), Ding Xiang (Flos Caryophylli) with Yu Jin (Radix Curcumae), Ya Xiao (crystalline sodium sulfate) with San Leng (Rhizoma Sparganii), Chuan Wu (Radix Aconiti) and Cao Wu (Radix Aconiti Kuznezoffi) with Xi Jiao (Cornu Rhinoceri), Ren Shen (Radix Ginseng) with Wu Ling Zhi (with Faeces Trogopterorum), and Guan Gui (Cortex Cinnamomi) with Shi Zhi (Halloysitum Rubrum).

V021-N01859.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01859.label: 十九畏
V021-N01859.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01859.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01859.label: 十九畏
V021-N01859.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TG[中医药学及其相关学科]｜中药药理学现象｜中药配伍
V021-N01859.definition: 古代中药文献记载以十九畏歌诀为基础的中药相畏配伍禁忌。

V021-N01860.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01860.label: 十八反
V021-N01860.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01860.definition: One of the contraindicated combinations of Chinese medicines. These include: Gan Cao (Radix Glycyrrhizae) is antagonistic to Da Ji (Radix Euphorbiae Pekinensis), Yuan Hua (Flos Genkwa), Gan Sui (Radix Euphorbiae Kansui) and Hai Zao (Sargassum); Wu Tou (Radix Aconiti) is antagonistic to Bei Mu (Bulbus Fritillariae), Gua Lou (Fructus Trichosanthis), Ban Xia (Rhizoma Pinelliae), Bai Lian (Radix Ampelopsis) and Bai Ji (Rhizoma Bletillae); and Li Lu (Radix Veratri Nigri) is antagonistic to Ren Shen (Radix Ginseng), Sha Shen (Radix Salviae Miltiorrhizae), Dan Shen (Radix Adenophorae), Ku Shen (Radix Sophorae Flavescentis), Xuan Shen (Radix Scrophulariae), Xi Xin (Herba Asari) and Shao Yao (Radix Paeoniae).

V021-N01860.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01860.label: 十八反
V021-N01860.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01860.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01860.label: 十八反
V021-N01860.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TG[中医药学及其相关学科]｜中药药理学现象｜中药配伍
V021-N01860.definition: 古代中药文献以歌诀或列表记载的中药相反配伍禁忌。《蜀本草》原有十八种，后世续有增加，已不限于十八种。

V021-N01861.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01861.label: 升降浮沉
V021-N01861.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01861.definition: The four cardinal directionalities of medicines: ascending, descending, sinking and floating. These four directions are associated with the weight, property, preparation and combination of medicines.

V021-N01861.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01861.label: 升降浮沉
V021-N01861.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01861.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01861.label: 升降浮沉
V021-N01861.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TG[中医药学及其相关学科]｜中药药理学现象｜中药性味
V021-N01861.definition: 中药作用的四类趋向性。升是上升，升提；降是下降，降逆；浮是发散，上行；沉是泄利，收敛，下行。

V021-N01763.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01763.label: 另煎
V021-N01763.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01763.definition: A method to decoct some medicines separately (2–3 hours), usually precious medicines, to ensure that the ingredients remain active.

V021-N01763.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01763.label: 单煎
V021-N01763.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01763.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01763.label: 另煎
V021-N01763.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01763.label: 另煎
V021-N01763.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜剂型、煎服法
V021-N01763.definition: 由于防止羚羊角（用代用品）、人参等贵重药 物煎出的有效成分被其他同煎的药渣所吸 附，须将其单独煎煮取汁的方法。

V021-N01766.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01766.label: 君药
V021-N01766.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01766.definition: Ingredient(s) that provide a dominant curative action on the main pattern/disorder or primary symptoms.

V021-N01766.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01766.label: 君药
V021-N01766.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01766.label: 君药
V021-N01766.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜方剂学总论
V021-N01766.definition: 方剂中对主证或主要症状起 主要治疗作用的药物。

V021-N01767.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01767.label: 和解剂
V021-N01767.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01767.definition: Formulas to harmonize and release Shaoyang, coordinate the liver and spleen, and regulate the stomach and intestines. They are used to treat pathogenic factor affecting the Shaoyang, disharmony between the liver and spleen and lack of coordination between the stomach and intestines. These formulas are categorized into three types: formulas to harmonize Shaoyang; formulas to harmonize the liver and spleen; and formulas to harmonize the stomach and intestines.

V021-N01767.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01767.label: 和解剂
V021-N01767.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01767.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01767.label: 和解剂
V021-N01767.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜方剂｜方剂功效分类
V021-N01767.definition: 具有和解少阳、调和肝脾、调和寒热等作用，主治伤寒邪在少阳、肝脾不和、寒热错杂的方剂。

V021-N01767.label: 和解剂
V021-N01767.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜方剂
V021-N01767.definition: 具有和解少阳、调和肝脾、调和寒热等作用，主治伤寒邪在少阳、肝脾不和、寒热错杂的方剂。

V021-N01865.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01865.label: 四气
V021-N01865.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01865.definition: The four basic properties of medicines—cold, hot, warmth, and coolness.

V021-N01865.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01865.label: 四性
V021-N01865.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01865.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01865.label: 四气
V021-N01865.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01865.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01865.label: 四气（中药）
V021-N01865.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TG[中医药学及其相关学科]｜中药药理学现象｜中药性味｜四气五味
V021-N01865.definition: 寒、热、温、凉、平等功能药性的统称。又称“四性”。

V021-N01865.label: 四之气
V021-N01865.path: 临床术语｜原理和经验｜原理｜五运六气学说原理｜运气学说｜五运六气｜六气｜主气
V021-N01865.definition: 指斗建由未中至酉中，太阴湿土所主的时间，施布着湿热蒸腾，云雨时行之气。

V021-N01768.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01768.label: 固涩剂
V021-N01768.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01768.definition: Formulas mainly consisting of medicines to astringe or secure qi, blood, essence and body fluids. They are indicated for loss of or abnormal leakage/discharge of qi, blood, essence and body fluids. These formulas are categorized into five types: formulas to secure the exterior and stop sweating; formulas to astringe the lung and stop coughing; formulas to astringe the large intestine and stop diarrhoea; secure the essence gate and stop nocturnal emissions/urinary emissions; and secure Chong and Ren meridians and stop uterine bleeding/leucorrhoea.

V021-N01768.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01768.label: 涩剂
V021-N01768.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01768.definition: Formulas that prevent qi, blood, essence and body fluids from exhaustion and collapse.

V021-N01768.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01768.label: 固涩剂
V021-N01768.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01768.label: 固涩剂
V021-N01768.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜方剂分类
V021-N01768.definition: 以固涩药为主配伍组成，具有收敛固涩作 用，治疗气、血、精、津液耗散滑脱等证方剂 的统称。分固表止汗剂、敛肺止咳剂、涩肠 固脱剂、涩精止遗剂、固崩止带剂等。

V021-N01768.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01768.label: 固涩剂
V021-N01768.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜方剂｜方剂功效分类
V021-N01768.definition: 以固涩药为主组方，具有收敛固涩作用，治疗气、血、精、津耗散滑脱病证的方剂。

V021-N01768.label: 固涩剂
V021-N01768.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜方剂
V021-N01768.definition: 以固涩药为主组方，具有收敛固涩作用，治疗气、血、精、津耗散滑脱病证的方剂。

V021-N01866.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01866.label: 固表止汗药
V021-N01866.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01866.definition: Medicines that are sweet in flavour and neutral in property. They mainly act to secure the exterior and stop sweating and are indicated for spontaneous sweating or night sweats.

V021-N01866.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01866.label: 固表止汗药
V021-N01866.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜收涩药

V021-N01866.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01866.label: 固表止汗药
V021-N01866.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类｜收涩药
V021-N01866.definition: 指药物性味多甘平，性收敛，具有行肌表，调节卫分，顾护腠理而有固表止汗的功效，临床用于气虚肌表不固，腠理疏松，津液外泄而自汗；阴虚不能制阳，阳热迫津外泄而盗汗的药物。

V021-N01866.label: 固表止汗药
V021-N01866.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片｜收涩药

V021-N01770.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01770.label: 复方
V021-N01770.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01770.definition: Formulas consisting of two or more set formulas. They are often used for complex conditions.

V021-N01770.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01770.label: 复方
V021-N01770.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01770.label: 复方
V021-N01770.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜方剂学总论
V021-N01770.definition: 两味药物以上组成的方剂。古称重方。

V021-N01770.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01770.label: 复方
V021-N01770.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜方剂
V021-N01770.definition: 指由二味或二味以上药物组成的方剂。

V021-N01771.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01771.label: 大方
V021-N01771.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01771.definition: Formulas used for combined patterns upon contraction of excessive pathogenic factors. These include the following five aspects: ① drastic potency; ② many ingredients; ③ large doses; ④ take the large amount in one single dose; ⑤ indicated for major, severe disorders of the lower jiao.

V021-N01771.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01771.label: 大方
V021-N01771.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01772.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01772.label: 奇方
V021-N01772.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01772.definition: Formulas with one single ingredient or odd-numbered ingredients.

V021-N01772.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01772.label: 奇方
V021-N01772.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01773.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01773.label: 安神剂
V021-N01773.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01773.definition: Formulas mainly consisting of medicines to calm the mind. Indicated for mental restlessness. These formulas are categorized into two types: formulas to calm the mind with heavy medicines; and formulas to tranquilize the mind by nourishing yin and blood.

V021-N01773.label: 安神剂
V021-N01773.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜方剂｜方剂功效分类
V021-N01773.definition: 以安神药为主组方，具有安神定志作用，治疗神志不安病证的方剂和中成药。

V021-N01773.label: 安神剂
V021-N01773.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜方剂
V021-N01773.definition: 以安神药为主组方，具有安神定志作用，治疗神志不安病证的方剂。

V021-N01868.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01868.label: 安神药
V021-N01868.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01868.definition: Medicines to calm the mind. Based on the property and efficacy, these medicines are further categorized into two types: heavyweight medicines to tranquilize the mind; and medicines to nourish the heart mind.

V021-N01868.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01868.label: 安神药
V021-N01868.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01868.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类
V021-N01868.definition: 以安定神志为主要功效，常用以治疗心神不宁病证的药物。

V021-N01868.label: 安神药
V021-N01868.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片
V021-N01868.definition: 以安定神志为主要功效，常用以治疗心神不宁病证的药物。

V021-N01774.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01774.label: 寒下剂
V021-N01774.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01774.definition: Formulas mainly consisting of cold-property ingredients. They are indicated for interior excessive heat accumulation pattern.

V021-N01774.label: 寒下剂
V021-N01774.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂｜泻下剂

V021-N01774.label: 寒下剂
V021-N01774.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜方剂分类
V021-N01774.definition: 以寒性泻下药为主配伍组成，治疗里热实证 的泻下剂。

V021-N01774.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01774.label: 寒下剂
V021-N01774.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜方剂｜方剂功效分类｜泻下剂
V021-N01774.definition: 以寒性泻下药为主组方，治疗里热积滞实证的方剂。

V021-N01774.label: 寒下剂
V021-N01774.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜方剂｜泻下剂
V021-N01774.definition: 以寒性泻下药为主组方，治疗里热积滞实证的方剂。

V021-N01775.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01775.label: 小方
V021-N01775.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01775.definition: Formulas used for one pattern alone upon contraction of mild pathogenic factors. These include the following three aspects: ① mild medical conditions; ② indicated for disorders of the upper jiao and take in small amount in frequent intervals; ③ fewer ingredients

V021-N01775.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01775.label: 小方
V021-N01775.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01869.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01869.label: 峻下逐水药
V021-N01869.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01869.definition: Medicines that are bitter in flavour and cold in property. These medicines often have a drastic effect and can cause severe diarrhoea and relieve retained water. They are indicated for oedema, pleural effusion, ascites, or panting due to phlegm-fluid retention.

V021-N01869.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01869.label: 峻下逐水药
V021-N01869.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜泻下药

V021-N01869.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01869.label: 峻下逐水药
V021-N01869.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类｜泻下药
V021-N01869.definition: 指苦寒有毒，药力峻猛，服药后能引起剧烈腹泻，有的兼能利尿，能使体内潴留的水饮通过二便排出体外，消除肿胀。适用于全身水肿，大腹胀满，以及停饮等正气未衰，邪盛证急之证的药物。

V021-N01869.label: 峻下逐水药
V021-N01869.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片｜泻下药

V021-N01776.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01776.label: 平旦服
V021-N01776.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01776.definition: To take the medicine in the morning on an empty stomach.

V021-N01776.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01776.label: 平旦服
V021-N01776.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01777.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01777.label: 开窍剂
V021-N01777.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01777.definition: Formulas containing aromatic medicines. They are indicated for loss of consciousness and blockage of orifices. These formulas are categorized into two types: formulas to clear heat; and formulas to warm the interior and open the orifices.

V021-N01777.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01777.label: 开窍剂
V021-N01777.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01777.label: 开窍剂
V021-N01777.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜方剂分类
V021-N01777.definition: 以芳香开窍药为主配伍组成，具有开窍醒神 作用，治疗窍闭神昏证方剂的统称。分凉开 剂、温开剂等。

V021-N01777.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01777.label: 开窍剂
V021-N01777.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜方剂｜方剂功效分类
V021-N01777.definition: 以芳香开窍药为主组方，具开窍醒神作用，治疗窍闭神昏证的方剂和中成药。

V021-N01777.label: 开窍剂
V021-N01777.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜方剂
V021-N01777.definition: 以芳香开窍药为主组方，具开窍醒神作用，治疗窍闭神昏证的方剂。

V021-N01871.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01871.label: 开窍药
V021-N01871.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01871.definition: Medicines that are aromatic and pungent to open the orifices and refresh the mind. They are indicated for mental unconsciousness in block pattern.

V021-N01871.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01871.label: 开窍药
V021-N01871.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01871.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01871.label: 开窍药
V021-N01871.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类
V021-N01871.definition: 以开窍醒神为主要功效，常用以治疗闭证神昏的药物，称为开窍药。因具辛香走窜之性，又称芳香开窍药。

V021-N01871.label: 开窍药
V021-N01871.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片

V021-N01872.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01872.label: 归经
V021-N01872.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01872.definition: The ability of medicines to access a channel/meridian. Meridian affinity is based on the theories on zang–fu organs and meridians.

V021-N01872.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01872.label: 归经
V021-N01872.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01872.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01872.label: 归经
V021-N01872.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TG[中医药学及其相关学科]｜中药药理学现象｜中药性味
V021-N01872.definition: 中药作用归属、趋向于某脏腑、经络或特定部位等的定位、定向理论。

V021-N01778.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01778.label: 急方
V021-N01778.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01778.definition: Formulas indicated for emergency or critical conditions. These include the following four aspects: ① critical conditions that require immediate care; ② fast purging efficacy; ③ drastic potency; ④ directed at symptoms in acute conditions, such as Kai Guan San (Lockjaw-Relieving Powder) or Si Ni Tang (Frigid Extremities Decoction).

V021-N01778.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01778.label: 急方
V021-N01778.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01778.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V021-N01778.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂｜泻下剂

V021-N01778.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01778.label: 急救方
V021-N01778.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜方剂｜其他剂类
V021-N01778.definition: 指药性峻猛，治疗病势急重急于取效的方剂。

V021-N01873.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01873.label: 收敛止血药
V021-N01873.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01873.definition: Medicines that are astringent and neutral in property. They mainly act to astringe and stop bleeding. These medicines are widely used for all kinds of bleeding.

V021-N01873.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01873.label: 收敛止血药
V021-N01873.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜消食药｜驱虫药｜止血药

V021-N01873.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01873.label: 收敛止血药
V021-N01873.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类｜理血药｜止血药（中药）
V021-N01873.definition: 指大多味涩，或为炭类，或质黏，能收敛止血，广泛用于各种出血病证而无瘀滞的药物。

V021-N01873.label: 收敛止血药
V021-N01873.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片｜理血药｜止血药

V021-N01874.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01874.label: 收涩药
V021-N01874.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01874.definition: Medicines to astringe and secure qi, blood, essence and body fluids. They are indicated for spontaneous sweating, night sweats, nocturnal emissions, enuresis, persistent leucorrhoea, uterine bleeding, chronic diarrhoea and chronic dysentery. Based on the property, efficacy and indications, astringent medicines are further divided into medicines to secure the exterior and stop sweating, medicines to astringe the lung and intestine and medicines to secure semen, astringe the urine and stop leucorrhoea.

V021-N01874.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01874.label: 收涩药
V021-N01874.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01874.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01874.label: 固涩药
V021-N01874.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜收涩药

V021-N01874.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01874.label: 收涩药
V021-N01874.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类
V021-N01874.definition: 以收敛固涩为主要功效，常用以治疗各种滑脱病证的药物，称为收涩药，又称固涩药。

V021-N01874.label: 收涩药
V021-N01874.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片

V021-N01875.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01875.label: 攻下药
V021-N01875.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01875.definition: Medicines that are bitter in flavour and cold in property. They have strong effect in promoting bowel movements and clearing fire/heat. These medicines are indicated for constipation due to excess heat and retention of dry faeces.

V021-N01875.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01875.label: 攻下药
V021-N01875.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜泻下药

V021-N01875.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01875.label: 攻下药
V021-N01875.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类｜泻下药
V021-N01875.definition: 属泻下药（中药），性味多苦寒沉降，既有较强的攻下通便作用，又有清热泻火功效，主要用于实热积滞，大便秘结，燥屎坚结的药物。

V021-N01875.label: 攻下药
V021-N01875.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片｜泻下药

V021-N01781.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01781.label: 散剂
V021-N01781.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01781.definition: A powder-like preparation made from a mixture of one or more herbs.

V021-N01781.label: 散剂

V021-N01781.definition: 将单味药或复方研成极细粉末的制剂。

V021-N01781.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜剂型、煎服法

V021-N01781.definition: 由一种或多种药材混合而制成的粉末状制剂，分内服散剂、煮散剂及外用散剂。

V021-N01781.label: 散剂
V021-N01781.definition: 由一种或多种药材混合而制成的粉末状制剂，分内服散剂、煮散剂及外用散剂。

V021-N01782.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01782.label: 文火
V021-N01782.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01782.definition: A mild and slow fire to maintain the temperature in decocting Chinese medicine after boiling.

V021-N01878.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01878.definition: Food that should be avoided while taking medication.
