V021-N01786.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01786.label: 条剂
V021-N01786.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01786.definition: An external dosage form of fine medicinal powder mixed with mulberry paper.

V021-N01786.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01786.label: 条剂
V021-N01786.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01786.label: 条剂
V021-N01786.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜剂型、煎服法
V021-N01786.definition: 将药物研细过筛，混匀，用桑皮纸粘药膏后 搓捻成细条，或用桑皮纸搓捻成条粘一薄层 面糊，再黏附药物而形成的外用剂型。

V021-N01786.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01786.label: 条剂
V021-N01786.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜剂型
V021-N01786.definition: 将药物细粉或药膏粘附在桑皮纸捻成的细条上的一种外用剂型。

V021-N01786.label: 条剂
V021-N01786.definition: 将药物细粉或药膏粘附在桑皮纸捻成的细条上的一种外用剂型。

V021-N01769.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01769.label: 栓剂
V021-N01769.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01769.definition: A solid dosage form made from fine medicinal powder and bases. It is inserted into the rectum/vagina, where it dissolves or melts and exerts local or systemic effects.

V021-N01769.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01769.label: 坐药
V021-N01769.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01769.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01769.label: 栓剂
V021-N01769.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01769.label: 栓剂
V021-N01769.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜剂型、煎服法
V021-N01769.definition: 将药材提取物或药粉与适宜基质制成供腔 道给药的固体剂型。

V021-N01769.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01769.label: 栓剂
V021-N01769.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜剂型
V021-N01769.definition: 由药物和基质混合制成，专供塞入肛门、阴道等腔道的一种固体剂型。

V021-N01769.label: 栓剂
V021-N01769.definition: 由药物和基质混合制成，专供塞入肛门、阴道等腔道的一种固体剂型。

V021-N01881.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01881.label: 止咳平喘药
V021-N01881.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01881.definition: Medicines to stop coughing and alleviate panting. These medicines enter the lung meridian and are indicated for coughing and panting.

V021-N01881.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01881.label: 止咳平喘药
V021-N01881.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01881.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01881.label: 止咳平喘药
V021-N01881.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类｜化痰止咳平喘药
V021-N01881.definition: 指多归肺经，味或辛、或苦、或甘，性或寒或温，通过宣肺、降肺、泻肺、润肺、敛肺及化痰达到止咳、平喘作用，用于制止或减轻咳嗽和喘息的中药。

V021-N01881.label: 止咳平喘药
V021-N01881.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片｜化痰止咳平喘药

V021-N01882.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01882.label: 止血药
V021-N01882.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01882.definition: Medicines to stop bleeding. They are indicated for internal or external bleeding. Based on the property and functions, these medicines are further categorized into four types: medicines to cool blood and stop bleeding, medicines to transform stasis and stop bleeding, medicines to astringe and stop bleeding and medicines to warm meridians and stop bleeding.

V021-N01882.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01882.label: 止血药
V021-N01882.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜消食药｜驱虫药

V021-N01882.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V021-N01882.label: 止血药
V021-N01882.path: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）｜中医外科学｜外科学治疗
V021-N01882.definition: 具有收涩凝血作用的制剂。

V021-N01882.label: 止血药
V021-N01882.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片｜理血药

V021-N01787.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01787.label: 武火
V021-N01787.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01787.definition: A strong and quick fire in decocting Chinese medicine.

V021-N01787.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01787.label: 武火
V021-N01787.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01787.label: 武火
V021-N01787.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜剂型、煎服法

V021-N01884.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01884.label: 水制
V021-N01884.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01884.definition: A processing method to use water or other liquid auxiliary materials, including washing, bleaching, soaking, refining with water, etc.

V021-N01884.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01884.label: 水制
V021-N01884.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01884.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01884.label: 水制
V021-N01884.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TJ[工艺学与中药技术]｜中药制药工艺｜炮制
V021-N01884.definition: 利用水或其他液体辅料处理药材的方法。常见的包括漂洗、闷润、浸泡、喷洒、水飞等。

V021-N01884.label: 水制
V021-N01884.path: 临床术语｜中医操作/方法｜药物炮制法/操作
V021-N01884.definition: 用水或其他液体辅料处理药材的方法。

V021-N01885.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01885.label: 水飞
V021-N01885.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01885.definition: A method to obtain extremely fine medicinal powder in water.

V021-N01885.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01885.label: 水飞
V021-N01885.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01885.label: 水飞
V021-N01885.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜中药学类｜炮制
V021-N01885.definition: 取按规定处理后的药材，加适量水共研细，再加多量水，搅拌，倾出混悬液，下沉部分再按前法反复操作数次，除去杂质，合并混悬液，静置后取沉淀物，干燥，研散的炮制方法。

V021-N01885.label: 水飞
V021-N01885.path: 临床术语｜中医操作/方法｜药物炮制法/操作｜水制
V021-N01885.definition: 是借药物在水中的沉降性质分取药材极细粉末的方法。

V021-N01790.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01790.label: 汤剂
V021-N01790.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01790.definition: A liquid preparation form by boiling or soaking the ingredients in water, and taken after the sediment is removed.

V021-N01790.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01790.label: 汤剂
V021-N01790.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01790.label: 汤剂
V021-N01790.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜剂型、煎服法
V021-N01790.definition: 将药材饮片或粗粒加水煎煮 或浸泡，去渣取汁服用的液体剂型。

V021-N01790.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01790.label: 汤剂
V021-N01790.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜剂型
V021-N01790.definition: 中药材饮片或粗末加水煎煮，去渣取汁服用的液体剂型。

V021-N01790.label: 汤剂
V021-N01790.definition: 中药材饮片或粗末加水煎煮，去渣取汁服用的液体剂型。

V021-N00410.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N00410.label: 汤头
V021-N00410.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N00410.definition: Oral herbal formulas to be decocted with water. Wang Ang, a Qing dynasty physician compiled a book named Tang Tou Ge Jue (Decoction in Rhymes) to make it easier for learners to memorize.

V021-N00410.label: 汤头歌诀
V021-N00410.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜医史文献｜医书
V021-N00410.definition: 入门性方剂著作，清代汪昂撰。

V021-N01791.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01791.label: 治燥剂
V021-N01791.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01791.definition: Formulas that act to dispel external dryness with pungent, light-weight ingredients or eliminate internal dryness with sweet, cold and yin-nourishing ingredients. These formulas are subdivided into two types: formulas to dispel external dryness; and formulas to nourish yin and moisten internal dryness.

V021-N01791.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01791.label: 治燥剂
V021-N01791.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01791.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01791.label: 治燥剂
V021-N01791.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜方剂｜方剂功效分类
V021-N01791.definition: 以辛散轻宣或甘凉滋润药为主组方，具有轻宣外燥或滋阴润燥作用，治疗燥证的方剂。

V021-N01791.label: 治燥剂
V021-N01791.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜方剂
V021-N01791.definition: 以辛散轻宣或甘凉滋润药为主组方，具有轻宣外燥或滋阴润燥作用，治疗燥证的方剂。

V021-N01814.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01814.label: 治风剂
V021-N01814.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01814.definition: Formulas mainly consisting of wind-removing or wind-extinguishing medicines. They are indicated for external or internal wind.

V021-N01814.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01814.label: 治风剂
V021-N01814.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01814.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01814.label: 祛风剂
V021-N01814.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂｜治风剂

V021-N01814.label: 治风剂
V021-N01814.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜方剂分类
V021-N01814.definition: 以辛散祛风或熄风止痉药为主配伍组成，具 有疏散外风或平熄内风的作用，治疗风证方 剂的统称。分疏散外风剂、平熄内风剂等。

V021-N01814.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01814.label: 治风剂
V021-N01814.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜方剂｜方剂功效分类
V021-N01814.definition: 以辛散祛风或息风止痉药为主组方，具有疏散外风或平息内风作用，治疗风病的方剂和中成药。

V021-N01814.label: 治风剂
V021-N01814.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜方剂
V021-N01814.definition: 以辛散祛风或息风止痉药为主组方，具有疏散外风或平息内风作用，治疗风病的方剂

V021-N01792.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01792.label: 泻下剂
V021-N01792.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01792.definition: Formulas to promote bowel movements, remove food stagnation in the stomach and intestines, or resolve water retention. They are indicated for excessive interior pattern. These formulas are categorized into four types: formulas to drain downward with cold-property medicines; formulas to drain downward with warm-property medicines; formulas to drain downward with moistening medicines; and formulas to drain downward with water-expelling medicines.

V021-N01792.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01792.label: 泻下剂
V021-N01792.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01792.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01792.label: 攻下剂
V021-N01792.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂｜泻下剂

V021-N01792.label: 泻下剂
V021-N01792.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜方剂分类
V021-N01792.definition: 以泻下药为主配伍组成，具有通便、泻热、攻 积、逐水等作用，治疗里实证方剂的统称。 分寒下剂、温下剂、润下剂、逐水剂等。

V021-N01792.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01792.label: 泻下剂
V021-N01792.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜方剂｜方剂功效分类
V021-N01792.definition: 以泻下药为主组方，具有通便、泻热、攻积、逐水等作用，治疗里实证的方剂和中成药。

V021-N01792.label: 泻下剂
V021-N01792.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜方剂
V021-N01792.definition: 以泻下药为主组方，具有通便、泻热、攻积、逐水等作用，治疗里实证的方剂。

V021-N01886.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01886.label: 泻下药
V021-N01886.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01886.definition: Medicines to produce bowel movements. They are indicated for constipation or difficulty passing of stools. Based on the property and actions, these medicines are further categorized into three types: draining purgative medicines, moistening purgative medicines and drastic purgative medicines.

V021-N01886.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01886.label: 泻下药
V021-N01886.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01886.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01886.label: 泻下药
V021-N01886.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类
V021-N01886.definition: 指能引起腹泻，或润滑大肠，以泻下通便为主要功效的药物。

V021-N01886.label: 泻下药
V021-N01886.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片

V021-N01890.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01890.label: 活血祛瘀药
V021-N01890.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01890.definition: Medicines to circulate blood and resolve stasis. They are indicated for blood stasis. Based on the functions and clinical application, these medicines are further categorized into four types: medicines to circulate blood and stop pain; medicines to circulate blood and resolve stasis; medicines to circulate blood and heal the wound; and medicines to break blood and resolve masses.

V021-N01890.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01890.label: 活血祛瘀药
V021-N01890.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜消食药｜驱虫药｜止血药｜温经止血药｜活血化瘀药

V021-N01890.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01890.label: 活血化瘀药
V021-N01890.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类｜理血药
V021-N01890.definition: 以通利血脉、促进血行、消散瘀血为主要功效，用以治疗瘀血证的药物，也称活血祛瘀药。

V021-N01795.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01795.label: 浸膏
V021-N01795.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01795.definition: A concentrated medicated preparation obtained by extracting the active constituents with appropriate solvents.

V021-N01795.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01795.label: 浸膏
V021-N01795.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01895.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01895.label: 消食药
V021-N01895.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01895.definition: Medicines to promote digestion and transform food stagnation. They are indicated for disorders due to food stagnation.

V021-N01895.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01895.label: 消食药
V021-N01895.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01895.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01895.label: 消导药
V021-N01895.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜消食药

V021-N01895.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01895.label: 消食药
V021-N01895.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类
V021-N01895.definition: 指以消化食积为主要功效，常用以治疗饮食积滞的药物。

V021-N01895.label: 消食药
V021-N01895.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片

V021-N01797.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01797.label: 涌吐剂
V021-N01797.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01797.definition: Formulas to induce vomiting, expectorate phlegm, undigested food and poison in the stomach. They are indicated for phlegm syncope, food stagnation and food poisoning.

V021-N01797.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01797.label: 涌吐剂
V021-N01797.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂｜其他方剂

V021-N01797.label: 涌吐剂
V021-N01797.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜方剂分类
V021-N01797.definition: 以涌吐药物为主配伍组成，具有涌吐痰涎、 宿食、胃中毒物等作用，以治疗痰厥、食积、 误食毒物等证方剂的统称。

V021-N01797.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01797.label: 涌吐剂
V021-N01797.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜方剂｜方剂功效分类
V021-N01797.definition: 以涌吐药为主组方，具有涌吐痰涎、宿食、毒物作用，治疗痰涎、食积、以及胃中毒物的方剂。

V021-N01797.label: 涌吐剂
V021-N01797.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜方剂
V021-N01797.definition: 以涌吐药为主组方，具有涌吐痰涎、宿食、毒物作用，治疗痰涎、食积、以及胃中毒物的方剂。

V021-N01896.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01896.label: 涌吐药
V021-N01896.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01896.definition: Medicines to produce nausea and vomiting. They are indicated for food poisoning, indigestion and phlegm stagnation in the stomach or above the chest.

V021-N01896.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01896.label: 涌吐药
V021-N01896.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01896.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01896.label: 催吐药
V021-N01896.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜涌吐药

V021-N01896.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01896.label: 涌吐药
V021-N01896.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类
V021-N01896.definition: 以促使呕吐为主要功效，用以治疗毒物、宿食、痰涎等停滞在胃脘或胸膈以上所致病证的药物，也称催吐药。

V021-N01896.label: 涌吐药
V021-N01896.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片

V021-N01798.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01798.label: 润下剂
V021-N01798.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01798.definition: Formulas mainly consisting of medicines to nourish yin and purge the intestine. They are indicated for constipation due to intestinal dryness.

V021-N01798.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01798.label: 润下剂
V021-N01798.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂｜泻下剂

V021-N01798.label: 润下剂
V021-N01798.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜方剂分类
V021-N01798.definition: 以增液润燥药与泻下药为主配伍组成，治疗 肠燥便秘等证的泻下剂。

V021-N01798.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01798.label: 润下剂
V021-N01798.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜方剂｜方剂功效分类｜泻下剂
V021-N01798.definition: 由滋润滑肠药与泻下药为主组方，治疗津枯肠燥便秘证的方剂。

V021-N01798.label: 润下剂
V021-N01798.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜方剂｜泻下剂
V021-N01798.definition: 由滋润滑肠药与泻下药为主组方，治疗津枯肠燥便秘证的方剂。

V021-N01897.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01897.label: 润下药
V021-N01897.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01897.definition: Medicines that are sweet in flavour and oily in quality. They mainly act to moisten the intestine, soften faeces and promote bowel movements. They are indicated for constipation due to exhaustion of fluids, yin deficiency or blood deficiency resulting from ageing, a weak constitution, chronic disease and childbirth.

V021-N01897.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01897.label: 润下药
V021-N01897.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜泻下药｜快药

V021-N01897.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01897.label: 润下药
V021-N01897.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类｜泻下药
V021-N01897.definition: 指富含油脂、味甘质润，能润滑大肠，促使排便而不致峻泻的药物。

V021-N01897.label: 润下药
V021-N01897.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片｜泻下药

V021-N01898.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01898.label: 清炒
V021-N01898.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01898.definition: A method to fry without adjuvants. According to the temperature, plain stir-frying is divided into fried yellow, scorch fry and charcoaled fry.

V021-N01898.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01898.label: 清炒
V021-N01898.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01898.label: 清炒
V021-N01898.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜中药学类｜炮制
V021-N01898.definition: 净药材或切制品置锅中，不加辅料，用文火炒至表面黄色；或用中火炒至表面焦黄色，断面色加深，取出放凉的炒制法。

V021-N01898.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01898.label: 清炒
V021-N01898.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TJ[工艺学与中药技术]｜中药制药工艺｜炮制｜火制｜炒法
V021-N01898.definition: 是不加任何辅料的炒法，包括炒黄、炒焦、炒炭三种不同的火候要求。

V021-N01899.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01899.label: 清热凉血药
V021-N01899.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01899.definition: Medicines that are sweet, bitter or salty in flavour and cold in property. They are mainly indicated for excess heat in the Ying nutrients and blood phases. Some medicines can also nourish yin and engender fluids. These medicines can be used for yin deficiency causing damage to fluids.

V021-N01899.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01899.label: 清热凉血药
V021-N01899.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜清热药

V021-N01899.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01899.label: 清热凉血药
V021-N01899.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类｜清热药

V021-N01899.label: 清热凉血药
V021-N01899.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片｜清热药

V021-N01801.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01801.label: 清热剂
V021-N01801.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01801.definition: Formulas mainly consisting of heat-clearing medicines. They act to clear fire/heat, cool blood and remove toxins. These formulas are categorized into six types: formulas to clear heat in the qi phase; formulas that clear heat in the Ying nutrients phase and cool blood; formulas to clear heat in both qi and blood; formulas to clear heat and remove toxins; formulas to clear heat in Zang–fu organs; and formulas to clear deficiency heat.

V021-N01801.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01801.label: 清热剂
V021-N01801.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01801.label: 清热剂
V021-N01801.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜方剂分类
V021-N01801.definition: 以清热药为主配伍组成，具有清热、泻火、凉 血、解暑、解毒、清虚热等作用，治疗里热证 方剂的统称。分清气分热剂、清营凉血剂、 清热解毒剂、清脏腑热剂、清热解暑剂、清虚 热剂等。

V021-N01801.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01801.label: 清热剂
V021-N01801.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜方剂｜方剂功效分类
V021-N01801.definition: 以清热药为主组方，具有清热、泻火、凉血、解毒等作用，治疗各种热证的方剂和中成药。

V021-N01801.label: 清热剂
V021-N01801.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜方剂
V021-N01801.definition: 以清热药为主组方，具有清热、泻火、凉血、解毒等作用，治疗各种热证的方剂。

V021-N01901.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01901.label: 清热泻火药
V021-N01901.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01901.definition: Medicines that are bitter or sweet in flavour and cold in nature. They are mainly indicated for excess heat in the qi phase and fire heat in the zang–fu organs, including lung heat, stomach fire, heart fire or liver fire.

V021-N01901.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01901.label: 清热泻火药
V021-N01901.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜清热药

V021-N01901.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01901.label: 清热泻火药
V021-N01901.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类｜清热药
V021-N01901.definition: 指性味多苦寒或甘寒，以清泄气分邪热为主要作用，主治温热病邪入气分等气分实热证的药物。

V021-N01901.label: 清热泻火药
V021-N01901.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片｜清热药

V021-N01902.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01902.label: 清热燥湿药
V021-N01902.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01902.definition: Medicines that are bitter in flavour and cold in property. They mainly act to clear heat and dry dampness and are indicated for damp heat pattern.

V021-N01902.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01902.label: 清热燥湿药
V021-N01902.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜清热药

V021-N01902.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01902.label: 清热燥湿药
V021-N01902.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类｜清热药
V021-N01902.definition: 指性味苦寒，苦能燥湿，寒能清热，以清热燥湿为主要作用，主治湿热证的药物。

V021-N01902.label: 清热燥湿药
V021-N01902.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片｜清热药

V021-N01903.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01903.label: 清热药
V021-N01903.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01903.definition: Medicines to clear interior heat. They are indicated for interior heat pattern. Based on the property and actions, these medicines are further categorized into five types: medicines to clear heat/fire, medicines to clear heat and dry dampness, medicines to clear heat and cool blood, and medicines to clear deficiency heat.

V021-N01903.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01903.label: 清热药
V021-N01903.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01903.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01903.label: 清热药
V021-N01903.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类
V021-N01903.definition: 指以清解里热为主要功效，用以治疗里热证的药物。

V021-N01903.label: 清热药
V021-N01903.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片

V021-N01904.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01904.label: 清热解毒药
V021-N01904.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01904.definition: Medicines that are bitter in flavour and cold in property. They mainly act to clear heat and remove toxins and are therefore indicated for conditions due to toxic heat. Some medicines can also be used for snake bite or cancer.

V021-N01904.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01904.label: 清热解毒药
V021-N01904.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜清热药

V021-N01904.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01904.label: 清热解毒药
V021-N01904.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类｜清热药
V021-N01904.definition: 指性味多苦寒，以清热解毒为主要作用，主治各种热毒证的药物。

V021-N01904.label: 清热解毒药
V021-N01904.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片｜清热药

V021-N01905.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01905.label: 清虚热药
V021-N01905.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01905.definition: Medicine that are cold/cool in property. They mainly act to clear deficiency heat and alleviate bone-steaming sensation. They are indicated for internal heat due to yin deficiency.

V021-N01905.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01905.label: 清虚热药
V021-N01905.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜清热药

V021-N01905.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01905.label: 清虚热药
V021-N01905.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类｜清热药
V021-N01905.definition: 指药性寒凉，以清虚热、退骨蒸为主要作用，用于治疗肝肾阴虚等证的药物。

V021-N01905.label: 清虚热药
V021-N01905.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片｜清热药

V021-N01802.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01802.label: 温下剂
V021-N01802.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01802.definition: Formulas mainly consisting of warm, pungent medicines to warm yang and dissipate cold, coupled with bitter, cold medicines to purge pathogenic factors. They are indicated for excessive interior cold pattern.

V021-N01802.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01802.label: 温下剂
V021-N01802.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂｜泻下剂

V021-N01802.label: 温下剂
V021-N01802.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜方剂分类
V021-N01802.definition: 以温阳散寒配合苦寒攻下药为主配伍组成， 治疗里寒实证的泻下剂。

V021-N01802.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01802.label: 温下剂
V021-N01802.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜方剂｜方剂功效分类｜泻下剂
V021-N01802.definition: 以泻下药、温里祛寒药为主组方，治疗寒结兼有脾胃阳气不足的方剂。

V021-N01802.label: 温下剂
V021-N01802.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜方剂｜泻下剂
V021-N01802.definition: 以泻下药、温里祛寒药为主组方，治疗寒结兼有脾胃阳气不足的方剂。

V021-N01907.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01907.label: 温经止血药
V021-N01907.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01907.definition: Medicines that are warm/heat in property. They mainly act to warm the interior, dissipate cold, warm meridians and stop bleeding. These medicines are indicated for bleeding due to deficiency cold.

V021-N01907.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01907.label: 温经止血药
V021-N01907.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜消食药｜驱虫药｜止血药

V021-N01907.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01907.label: 温经止血药
V021-N01907.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类｜理血药｜止血药（中药）
V021-N01907.definition: 指药性温热，能温里散寒，益脾阳，固冲脉而统摄血液，具有温经止血功效，适用于脾不统血，冲脉失固之虚寒性出血等病证的药物。

V021-N01907.label: 温经止血药
V021-N01907.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片｜理血药｜止血药

V021-N01811.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01811.label: 温里剂
V021-N01811.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01811.definition: Formulas to warm the interior, supplement yang, dispel cold, and unblock blood vessels. They are indicated for interior cold pattern. These formulas are categorized into three types: formulas to warm the middle jiao and remove cold; formulas to resuscitate yang to prevent collapse; and formulas to warm meridians and dispel cold.

V021-N01811.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01811.label: 温里剂
V021-N01811.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01811.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01811.label: 祛寒剂
V021-N01811.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂｜温里剂

V021-N01811.label: 温里剂
V021-N01811.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜方剂分类
V021-N01811.definition: 以温热药为主配伍组成，具有温里助阳，散 寒通脉等作用，治疗里寒证方剂的统称。分 温中散寒剂、回阳救逆剂、温经散寒剂等。

V021-N01811.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01811.label: 温里剂（中成药）
V021-N01811.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中成药｜中成药功效分类
V021-N01811.definition: 以温热药为主组方，具有温里助阳、散寒通脉作用，治疗里寒证的方剂和中成药。

V021-N01811.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01811.label: 温里剂
V021-N01811.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜方剂｜方剂功效分类
V021-N01811.definition: 以温热药为主组方，具有温里助阳、散寒通脉作用，治疗里寒证的方剂和中成药。

V021-N01811.label: 温里剂
V021-N01811.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜方剂
V021-N01811.definition: 以温热药为主组方，具有温里助阳、散寒通脉作用，治疗里寒证的方剂。

V021-N01908.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01908.label: 温里药
V021-N01908.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01908.definition: Medicines to warm the interior and dissipate cold. They are indicated for interior cold pattern.

V021-N01908.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01908.label: 温里药
V021-N01908.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01908.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01908.label: 温里药
V021-N01908.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类
V021-N01908.definition: 指以温里祛寒为主要功效，常用以治疗里寒证的药物，称温里药，又名祛寒药。

V021-N01908.label: 温里药
V021-N01908.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片

V021-N01909.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01909.label: 漂
V021-N01909.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01909.definition: A method to soak medicines in static or running water for a period of time and exchange water regularly to remove the fishy smell, salt or toxic ingredients.

V021-N01909.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01909.label: 漂
V021-N01909.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01910.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01910.label: 火制
V021-N01910.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01910.definition: A processing method to use heat or fire, including frying, roasting, calcining, etc.

V021-N01910.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01910.label: 火制
V021-N01910.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01910.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01910.label: 火制
V021-N01910.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TJ[工艺学与中药技术]｜中药制药工艺｜炮制
V021-N01910.definition: 是将药物经火加热处理的方法。

V021-N01910.label: 火制
V021-N01910.path: 临床术语｜中医操作/方法｜药物炮制法/操作
V021-N01910.definition: 指炮制过程中主要用火加热即可达到炮制目的的一类炮制方法。陈嘉谟《本草蒙筌》有“火制四，有煅，有炮，有炙，有炒之不同”。除此之外，煨、烘、焙、烤、燎等方法亦属于火制法的范畴。药物经火制后，一般能达到改变药物的质地、颜色、气味及化学成分，从而达到改变或缓和药性，便于煎煮或粉碎，赋色矫味，增强疗效等目的。火制法在操作过程中要特别注意掌握火力大小。

V021-N01914.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01914.label: 炙
V021-N01914.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01914.definition: A method to use liquid adjuvants to stir-fry medicines to change the medicinal property, reinforce the efficacy and reduce side-effects. The excipients include wine, vinegar, salt, ginger, honey or oil.

V021-N01914.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01914.label: 炙
V021-N01914.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01914.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01914.label: 炙法
V021-N01914.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TJ[工艺学与中药技术]｜中药制药工艺｜炮制｜火制
V021-N01914.definition: 将净选或切制后的药物，加入一定量的液体辅料拌炒，使辅料逐渐渗入药物组织内部的炮制方法。根据辅料不同，分为酒炙、醋炙、盐炙、姜炙、蜜炙、油炙等。

V021-N01914.label: 炙法
V021-N01914.path: 临床术语｜中医操作/方法｜药物炮制法/操作｜火制
V021-N01914.definition: 将净选或切制后的药物，加入定量的液体辅料拌炒，使辅料逐渐渗入药物组织内部的炮制方法。

V021-N01914.vocabName: 简帛医药文献词典（2018）（未校勘）
V021-N01914.label: 炙
V021-N01914.path: 简帛医药文献词典（2018）（未校勘）｜下編 簡帛藥學詞語｜炮製詞語

V021-N01917.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01917.label: 煅
V021-N01917.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01917.definition: A method to calcine medicines directly or indirectly with a strong fire to fully extract the active ingredients and achieve maximal efficacy.

V021-N01917.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01917.label: 煅
V021-N01917.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01917.label: 煅
V021-N01917.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜中药学类｜炮制
V021-N01917.definition: 将净药材置耐火的容器内或直接安置无烟炉火（或股药炉）上高温烧煅，使其烈性降低、质地酥脆、易于粉碎的炮制方法。

V021-N01917.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01917.label: 煅法
V021-N01917.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TJ[工艺学与中药技术]｜中药制药工艺｜炮制｜火制
V021-N01917.definition: 药物直接放于无烟炉火中或适当的耐火容器内煅烧的一种方法。

V021-N01805.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01805.label: 煎药法
V021-N01805.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01805.definition: The decoction of Chinese medicine involves the pot, water, heat control, and decocting method.

V021-N01805.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01805.label: 煎药法
V021-N01805.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01805.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01805.label: 煎煮法
V021-N01805.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TJ[工艺学与中药技术]｜中药制药工艺
V021-N01805.definition: 指用水做溶剂，通过加热煮沸浸提药材成分的方法，又称煮提法或煎浸法。适用于有效成分能溶于水，且对湿、热较稳定的药材。

V021-N01918.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01918.label: 煨
V021-N01918.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01918.definition: A method to wrap medicines with water-mixed flour or wet paper, placed in the heat of the ash, or heated with oil-absorbent paper separated from the drug barrier so that the medicine is turned from raw to cooked.

V021-N01918.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01918.label: 煨
V021-N01918.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01918.label: 煨
V021-N01918.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜中药学类｜炮制
V021-N01918.definition: 将净药材或切制品外包裹一层能吸附油质如湿润的面粉或纸浆等辅料，再埋入加热的滑石粉煨烫，或将切制品层层隔纸加热烘煨的炮制方法。

V021-N01918.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01918.label: 煨法
V021-N01918.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TJ[工艺学与中药技术]｜中药制药工艺｜炮制｜火制
V021-N01918.definition: 将药物用湿面或湿纸包裹，置于加热的滑石粉中，或将药物直接置于加热的麦麸中，或将药物铺摊吸油纸上，层层隔纸加热，以除去部分油质。

V021-N01807.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01807.label: 理气剂
V021-N01807.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01807.definition: Formulas mainly consisting of medicines to move or down-regulate qi. They are indicated for qi stagnation or adverse ascending of qi. These formulas are categorized into two types: formulas to circulate qi; and formulas to down-regulate qi.

V021-N01807.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01807.label: 理气剂
V021-N01807.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01807.label: 理气剂
V021-N01807.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜方剂分类
V021-N01807.definition: 以理气药为主配伍组成，具有行气或降气作 用，治疗气滞或气逆证方剂的统称。分行气 剂、降气剂等。

V021-N01807.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01807.label: 理气剂
V021-N01807.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜方剂｜方剂功效分类
V021-N01807.definition: 以理气药为主组方，具行气或降气作用，治疗气滞或气逆病证的方剂和中成药。

V021-N01807.label: 理气剂
V021-N01807.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜方剂
V021-N01807.definition: 以理气药为主组方，具行气或降气作用，治疗气滞或气逆病证的方剂。

V021-N01919.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01919.label: 理气药
V021-N01919.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01919.definition: Medicines to regulate qi activity. They are indicated for qi stagnation and adverse flow of qi.

V021-N01919.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01919.label: 理气药
V021-N01919.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01919.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01919.label: 理气药
V021-N01919.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类
V021-N01919.definition: 指以疏理气机为主要功效，常用以治疗气机不畅之气滞、气逆证的药物，称为理气药，又称行气药。其中行气力强者，又称为破气药。

V021-N01919.label: 理气药
V021-N01919.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片

V021-N01809.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01809.label: 理血剂
V021-N01809.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01809.definition: Formulas mainly consisting of blood-regulating medicines. They are indicated for blood stasis or haemorrhage. These formulas are subdivided into two types: formulas to circulate blood and resolve stasis; and formulas to stop bleeding.

V021-N01809.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01809.label: 理血剂
V021-N01809.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂｜理气剂

V021-N01809.label: 理血剂
V021-N01809.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜方剂分类
V021-N01809.definition: 以理血药为主配伍组成，具有活血化瘀、止 血作用，治疗瘀血证和出血证方剂的统称。 分活血剂、止血剂等。

V021-N01809.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01809.label: 理血剂
V021-N01809.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜方剂｜方剂功效分类
V021-N01809.definition: 指以理血药为主组方，具有活血化瘀或止血作用，治疗瘀血证或出血证的方剂和中成药。

V021-N01809.label: 理血剂
V021-N01809.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜方剂
V021-N01809.definition: 指以理血药为主组方，具有活血化瘀或止血作用，治疗瘀血证或出血证的方剂。

V021-N01920.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01920.label: 相使
V021-N01920.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01920.definition: Use two or more medicines sharing common efficacies in combination, one being the principal medicine while the others play a subsidiary role to reinforce the action of the principal one.

V021-N01920.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01920.label: 相使
V021-N01920.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01920.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01920.label: 相使
V021-N01920.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TG[中医药学及其相关学科]｜中药药理学现象｜中药配伍
V021-N01920.definition: 中药性味相同或相近，或性味不同而以一药为主、另一药为辅配合应用以提高主药疗效的配伍关系。

V021-N01921.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01921.label: 相反
V021-N01921.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01921.definition: When two medicines are used in combination, their toxic or side-effects can be produced or enhanced.

V021-N01921.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01921.label: 相反
V021-N01921.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01921.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01921.label: 相反
V021-N01921.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TG[中医药学及其相关学科]｜中药药理学现象｜中药配伍
V021-N01921.definition: 两种药物合用，能产生或增强毒性反应或副作用的配伍关系。

V021-N01922.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01922.label: 相恶
V021-N01922.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01922.definition: When two medicines are used in combination, the positive effects of one medicine can be reduced or eliminated by the other.

V021-N01922.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01922.label: 相恶
V021-N01922.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01922.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01922.label: 相恶
V021-N01922.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TG[中医药学及其相关学科]｜中药药理学现象｜中药配伍
V021-N01922.definition: 一药能使另一药原有功效降低、甚至消失的配伍关系。

V021-N01923.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01923.label: 相杀
V021-N01923.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01923.definition: When two medicines are used in combination, one medicine can reduce or eliminate the toxic or side-effects of the other.

V021-N01923.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01923.label: 相杀
V021-N01923.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01923.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01923.label: 相杀
V021-N01923.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TG[中医药学及其相关学科]｜中药药理学现象｜中药配伍
V021-N01923.definition: 一药能减轻或消除另一药毒性或副作用的配伍关系。

V021-N01924.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01924.label: 相畏
V021-N01924.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01924.definition: When two medicines are used in combination, the toxic or side-effects of one medicine can be reduced or eliminated by the other.

V021-N01924.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01924.label: 相畏
V021-N01924.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01924.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01924.label: 相畏
V021-N01924.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TG[中医药学及其相关学科]｜中药药理学现象｜中药配伍
V021-N01924.definition: 一药毒性反应或副作用，能被合用的另一药减轻或消除的配伍关系。

V021-N01925.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01925.label: 相须
V021-N01925.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01925.definition: Use two medicines sharing similar properties in combination to reinforce each other’s action.

V021-N01925.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01925.label: 相须
V021-N01925.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01925.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01925.label: 相须
V021-N01925.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TG[中医药学及其相关学科]｜中药药理学现象｜中药配伍
V021-N01925.definition: 性味相类似的中药配合应用，以增强疗效的配伍关系。

V021-N01820.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01820.label: 硬膏
V021-N01820.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01820.definition: A solid medicated dressing for external application. Often consists of medicines, edible vegetable oil and red lead.

V021-N01820.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01820.label: 硬膏
V021-N01820.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂
V021-N01820.definition: A solid medicated dressing for external application. Often consists of medicines, edible vegetable oil and red lead.

V021-N01820.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01820.label: 膏药
V021-N01820.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01820.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V021-N01820.label: 膏药
V021-N01820.path: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）｜中医外科学｜外科学治疗
V021-N01820.definition: 按配方用若干药物浸于食用植物油中煎熬，去渣存油，加入黄丹炼制成膏料，摊涂于裱背材料上制成的外用制剂。

V021-N01820.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01820.label: 膏药
V021-N01820.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜剂型
V021-N01820.definition: 药材饮片、食用植物油与红丹（铅丹）或宫粉（铅粉）炼制成膏料，摊涂于裱背材料上制成的外用制剂。前者称为黑膏药，后者称为白膏药。

V021-N01820.label: 膏药
V021-N01820.definition: 药材饮片、食用植物油与红丹（铅丹）或宫粉（铅粉）炼制成膏料，摊涂于裱背材料上制成的外用制剂。前者称为黑膏药，后者称为白膏药。

V021-N01800.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01800.label: 祛暑剂
V021-N01800.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01800.definition: Formulas mainly consisting of medicines to clear summer heat. They are indicated for summer heat-related problems. These formulas are categorized into four types: formulas to clear summer heat; formulas to clear summer heat and release the exterior; formulas to clear summer heat and resolve dampness; and formulas to clear summer heat and benefit qi.

V021-N01800.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01800.label: 清暑剂
V021-N01800.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01800.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01800.label: 祛暑剂
V021-N01800.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂｜清暑剂

V021-N01800.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01800.label: 祛暑剂
V021-N01800.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜方剂｜方剂功效分类
V021-N01800.definition: 由祛暑药为主组成，具有祛除暑邪作用，用以治疗暑证的方剂。

V021-N01800.label: 祛暑剂
V021-N01800.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜方剂
V021-N01800.definition: 由祛暑药为主组成，具有祛除暑邪作用，用以治疗暑证的方剂。

V021-N01812.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01812.label: 祛湿剂
V021-N01812.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01812.definition: Formulas that act to resolve water retention and relieve stranguria are indicated for water dampness pattern. These formulas are categorized into five types: formulas to dry dampness and harmonize the stomach; formulas to clear heat and eliminate dampness; formulas to promote urination and drain dampness; formulas to warm and transform cold dampness; and formulas to remove wind and transform dampness.

V021-N01812.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01812.label: 祛湿剂
V021-N01812.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01812.label: 祛湿剂
V021-N01812.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜方剂分类
V021-N01812.definition: 以祛湿药物为主配伍组成，具有化湿行水， 通淋泄浊作用，治疗水湿为病方剂的统称。 分和胃燥湿剂、清热祛湿剂、利水渗湿剂、温 化水湿剂等。

V021-N01812.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01812.label: 祛湿剂
V021-N01812.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜方剂｜方剂功效分类
V021-N01812.definition: 以祛湿药为主组方，具有化湿利水、通淋泄浊作用，治疗水湿病证的方剂。

V021-N01812.label: 祛湿剂
V021-N01812.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜方剂
V021-N01812.definition: 以祛湿药为主组方，具有化湿利水、通淋泄浊作用，治疗水湿病证的方剂。

V021-N01813.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01813.label: 祛痰剂
V021-N01813.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01813.definition: Formulas that are indicated for phlegm from all causes. These formulas are subdivided into five types: formulas to dry dampness and transform phlegm; formulas to clear heat and transform phlegm; formulas to moisten dryness and transform phlegm; formulas to warm and transform phlegm; and formulas to stop wind and transform phlegm.

V021-N01813.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01813.label: 祛痰剂
V021-N01813.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01813.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01813.label: 除痰剂
V021-N01813.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂｜祛痰剂

V021-N01813.label: 祛痰剂
V021-N01813.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜方剂分类
V021-N01813.definition: 以祛痰药为主配伍组成，具有消除痰饮的作 用，治疗痰证方剂的统称。分温燥化痰剂、 清润化痰剂、治风化痰剂等。

V021-N01813.label: 祛痰剂
V021-N01813.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜方剂
V021-N01813.definition: 以祛痰药为主组方，具有消除痰涎功效，主治各种痰证的方剂。

V021-N01929.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01929.label: 祛风湿药
V021-N01929.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01929.definition: Medicines to eliminate wind, resolve dampness and alleviate pain. They are indicated for bi-impediment patterns. Based on the bi-impediment category and medicinal property, these medicines are further categorized into three types: medicines to remove wind and resolve dampness; medicines to remove wind, clear heat and resolve dampness; and medicines to remove wind, resolve dampness and strengthen tendons and bones.

V021-N01929.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01929.label: 祛风湿药
V021-N01929.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01929.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01929.label: 祛风湿药
V021-N01929.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类
V021-N01929.definition: 指以祛除风湿之邪为主，用以治疗风湿病证的药物。

V021-N01929.label: 祛风湿药
V021-N01929.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片

V021-N01815.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01815.label: 糊丸
V021-N01815.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01815.definition: Pills made from fine medicinal powder and uses rice paste, flour paste or medicated leaven paste as the excipient.

V021-N01815.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01815.label: 糊丸
V021-N01815.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01815.label: 糊丸
V021-N01815.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜剂型、煎服法
V021-N01815.definition: 将药材细粉用米糊或面糊等为黏合剂制成 的丸剂。

V021-N01815.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01815.label: 糊丸
V021-N01815.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜剂型｜丸剂
V021-N01815.definition: 指药材细粉以米糊或面糊等为黏合剂制成的丸剂。

V021-N01815.label: 糊丸
V021-N01815.path: 临床术语｜限定值｜剂型｜丸剂
V021-N01815.definition: 指药材细粉以米糊或面糊等为黏合剂制成的丸剂。

V021-N01817.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01817.label: 经方
V021-N01817.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01817.definition: Formulas recorded in medical books before the Han dynasty, represented by Zhang Zhongjing.

V021-N01817.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01817.label: 经方
V021-N01817.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01817.label: 经方
V021-N01817.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜方剂学总论
V021-N01817.definition: 汉代以前经典医药著作中记载的方剂，以张 仲景的方剂为代表。

V021-N01817.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01817.label: 经方
V021-N01817.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜方剂
V021-N01817.definition: 汉代以前经典医药著作中记载的方剂，以张仲景的方剂为代表。

V021-N01818.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01818.label: 缓方
V021-N01818.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01818.definition: Formulas indicated for chronic conditions with a weak constitution. These include the following six aspects: ① many mutually-counterbalanced ingredients; ② use non-toxic ingredients to alleviate symptoms but do not cause damage to the anti-pathogenic qi; ③ use slow-acting ingredients; ⑤ use pills to remove pathogenic factors gradually; ⑥ use demulcent medicines to boost the immune system to help recovery.

V021-N01818.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01818.label: 缓剂
V021-N01818.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01818.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01818.label: 缓方
V021-N01818.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01819.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01819.label: 膏剂
V021-N01819.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01819.definition: A medicated paste is made from decocted medicines with water or vegetable oil. It can be further categorized into fluid extract, extractum, ointment and plaster.

V021-N01819.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01819.label: 膏剂
V021-N01819.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01819.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01819.label: 膏剂
V021-N01819.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜剂型
V021-N01819.definition: 药材用水煎煮，去渣浓缩后，加炼蜜或糖制成的半流体内服膏剂，或用适宜的基质将药物制成专供外用的半固体或近似固体的外用膏剂。

V021-N01819.label: 膏剂
V021-N01819.definition: 药材用水煎煮，去渣浓缩后，加炼蜜或糖制成的半流体内服膏剂，或用适宜的基质将药物制成专供外用的半固体或近似固体的外用膏剂。

V021-N01821.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01821.label: 臣药
V021-N01821.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01821.definition: ① Ingredient(s) to help strengthen the action of the monarch medicines on main pattern or primary symptoms; ②ingredient(s) in a formula that provide a principal curative action for associated conditions or patterns.

V021-N01821.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01821.label: 臣药
V021-N01821.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01821.label: 臣药
V021-N01821.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜方剂学总论
V021-N01821.definition: 方剂中辅助君药治疗主证的 药物。

V021-N01669.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01669.label: 苦寒直折
V021-N01669.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01669.definition: Formulas that are indicated for exuberant interior heat. These formulas mainly consist of bitter, cold medicines: the bitter ones to clear fire and the cold ones to clear heat. A representative formula is Huang Lian Jie Du Tang (Coptis Toxin-Resolving Decoction).

V021-N01669.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01669.label: 苦寒直折
V021-N01669.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜治则治法

V021-N01822.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01822.label: 茶剂
V021-N01822.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01822.definition: Preparations made from the infusion or decoction of herbs or herbal extracts.

V021-N01822.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01822.label: 茶剂
V021-N01822.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01822.label: 茶剂
V021-N01822.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜剂型、煎服法
V021-N01822.definition: 含茶叶或不含茶叶的药材或药材提取物制 成的用沸水冲服、泡服或煎服的制剂。

V021-N01822.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01822.label: 袋泡剂
V021-N01822.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜剂型
V021-N01822.definition: 指饮片或提取物（液）与茶叶或其他辅料混合制成的内服制剂。

V021-N01822.label: 袋泡剂
V021-N01822.definition: 指饮片或提取物（液）与茶叶或其他辅料混合制成的内服制剂。

V021-N01931.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01931.label: 草药
V021-N01931.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01931.definition: Regional herbal medicines that may not be recorded in major books on materia medica; however, they are an integral part of Chinese medicine.

V021-N01931.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V021-N01931.label: 草药
V021-N01931.path: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）｜中医外科学｜外科学治疗
V021-N01931.definition: 一般无经典本草记载，民间按经验使用，加工炮制欠规范的天然药物。

V021-N01826.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01826.label: 蜜丸
V021-N01826.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01826.definition: Pills made from fine medicinal powder and uses honey as the excipient.

V021-N01826.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01826.label: 蜜丸
V021-N01826.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01826.label: 蜜丸
V021-N01826.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜剂型、煎服法
V021-N01826.definition: 将药材细粉以蜂蜜为黏合剂制成的丸剂。

V021-N01826.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01826.label: 蜜丸
V021-N01826.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜剂型｜丸剂
V021-N01826.definition: 将药物研成细粉用炼制的蜂蜜为粘合剂制成的丸剂。

V021-N01826.label: 蜜丸
V021-N01826.path: 临床术语｜限定值｜剂型｜丸剂
V021-N01826.definition: 将药物研成细粉用炼制的蜂蜜为粘合剂制成的丸剂。

V021-N01827.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01827.label: 蜡丸
V021-N01827.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01827.definition: Pills made from fine medicinal powder and uses beeswax as the excipient.

V021-N01827.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01827.label: 蜡丸
V021-N01827.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01827.label: 蜡丸
V021-N01827.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜剂型、煎服法
V021-N01827.definition: 将药材细粉用蜂蜡为黏合剂制成的丸剂。

V021-N01935.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01935.label: 补气药
V021-N01935.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01935.definition: Medicines that are sweet in flavour and warm or neutral in property. They mainly act to tonify qi and are indicated for qi deficiency.

V021-N01935.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01935.label: 补气药
V021-N01935.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜补虚药

V021-N01935.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01935.label: 补气药
V021-N01935.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类｜补益药
V021-N01935.definition: 性味多甘温或甘平，以补气为主要功效，能补益脏气以纠正脏气虚衰，用于治疗气虚证的药物。

V021-N01935.label: 补气药
V021-N01935.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片｜补虚药
V021-N01935.definition: 性味多甘温或甘平，以补气为主要功效，能补益脏气以纠正脏气虚衰，用于治疗气虚证的药物。

V021-N01828.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01828.label: 补益剂
V021-N01828.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01828.definition: Formulas mainly consisting of tonic medicines. They are indicated for deficiency of qi, blood and yin and yang. These formulas are further categorized into six types: formulas to tonify qi; formulas to tonify blood; formulas to tonify qi and blood; formulas to nourish yin; formulas to tonify yang; and formulas to tonify yin and yang.

V021-N01828.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01828.label: 补益剂
V021-N01828.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01828.label: 补益剂
V021-N01828.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜方剂分类
V021-N01828.definition: 以补益药为主配伍组成，具有补养人体气、 血、阴、阳等作用，主治各种虚证方剂的统 称。分补气剂、补血剂、气血双补剂、补阴 剂、补阳剂、阴阳并补剂。

V021-N01828.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01828.label: 补益剂
V021-N01828.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜方剂｜方剂功效分类
V021-N01828.definition: 以补益药为主组方，具有补养人体气、血、阴、阳等作用，治疗各种虚损病证的方剂和中成药。

V021-N01828.label: 补益剂
V021-N01828.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜方剂
V021-N01828.definition: 以补益药为主组方，具有补养人体气、血、阴、阳等作用，治疗各种虚损病证的方剂。

V021-N01938.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01938.label: 补血药
V021-N01938.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01938.definition: Medicines that are sweet in flavour and warm in property. They mainly act to tonify blood and are indicated for blood deficiency.

V021-N01938.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01938.label: 养血药
V021-N01938.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜补虚药

V021-N01938.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01938.label: 补血药
V021-N01938.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜补虚药

V021-N01938.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01938.label: 补血药
V021-N01938.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜药理学作用｜治疗应用（中药）｜血液学药物（中药）
V021-N01938.definition: 为具有改善血液质量、增加血红素值和红细胞数量作用，治疗贫血的中药。用于中药功能分类指甘温质润，具有补血的功效，主治血虚证的药物。

V021-N01938.label: 补血药
V021-N01938.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片｜补虚药

V021-N01939.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01939.label: 补阳药
V021-N01939.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01939.definition: Medicines that are sweet and pungent in flavour and warm in property. They mainly act to tonify yang qi and are indicated for yang deficiency.

V021-N01939.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01939.label: 补阳药
V021-N01939.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜补虚药

V021-N01939.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01939.label: 补阳药
V021-N01939.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类｜补益药
V021-N01939.definition: 味多甘辛咸，性多温热，以补肾阳为主要作用，肾阳之虚得补，其他脏腑得以温煦，从而消除或改善全身阳虚诸证的药物。

V021-N01939.label: 补阳药
V021-N01939.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片｜补虚药

V021-N01940.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01940.label: 补阴药
V021-N01940.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01940.definition: Medicines that are sweet in flavour and cold in property. They mainly act to nourish yin fluids and are indicated for yin deficiency (insufficiency of fluids).

V021-N01940.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01940.label: 养阴药
V021-N01940.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜补虚药

V021-N01940.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01940.label: 滋阴药
V021-N01940.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜补虚药

V021-N01940.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01940.label: 补阴药
V021-N01940.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜补虚药

V021-N01940.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01940.label: 补阴药
V021-N01940.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类｜补益药
V021-N01940.definition: 味甘性寒凉质润，具有滋养阴液、生津润燥兼能清热的功效，主要治疗阴虚津亏证的药物。

V021-N01940.label: 补阴药
V021-N01940.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片｜补虚药

V021-N01829.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01829.label: 表里双解剂
V021-N01829.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01829.definition: Formulas mainly consisting of medicines to release the exterior, warm the interior, and reinforce the body. They are indicated for pattern involving both the exterior and interior. These formulas are further categorized into three subtypes: exterior-releasing and interior-clearing formulas; exterior-releasing and interior-warming formulas; and exterior-releasing and interior-attacking formulas.

V021-N01829.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01829.label: 表里双解剂
V021-N01829.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂｜和解剂

V021-N01829.label: 表里双解剂
V021-N01829.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜方剂分类
V021-N01829.definition: 以解表药配合清热药、温里药、补益药等为 主配伍组成，具有表里同治作用，治疗表里 同病方剂的统称。分解表清里剂、解表温里 剂、解表通里剂等。

V021-N01829.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01829.label: 表里双解剂
V021-N01829.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜方剂｜方剂功效分类
V021-N01829.definition: 以解表药配伍清热药，或温里药，或泻下药等为主组方，具有表里同治、内外分解等作用，治疗表里同病的方剂。

V021-N01829.label: 表里双解剂
V021-N01829.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜方剂
V021-N01829.definition: 以解表药配伍清热药，或温里药，或泻下药等为主组方，具有表里同治、内外分解等作用，治疗表里同病的方剂。

V021-N01830.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01830.label: 解表剂
V021-N01830.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01830.definition: Formulas to induce sweating, relieve muscle soreness, and/or promote the eruption of measles. They are indicated for exterior pattern. These formulas are categorized into three types—formulas to release the exterior with pungent, warm medicines, formulas to release the exterior with pungent, cool medicines and formulas to reinforce healthy qi and release the exterior.

V021-N01830.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01830.label: 解表剂
V021-N01830.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01830.label: 解表剂
V021-N01830.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜方剂分类
V021-N01830.definition: 以辛散轻扬的解表药为主配伍组成，具有发 汗、解肌、透疹等作用，主治各种表证方剂的 统称。分为辛温解表剂、辛凉解表剂、扶正 解表剂等。

V021-N01830.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01830.label: 解表剂
V021-N01830.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜方剂｜方剂功效分类
V021-N01830.definition: 以解表药为主组方，具有发汗、解肌、透疹等作用，治疗表证的方剂和中成药。

V021-N01830.label: 解表剂
V021-N01830.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜方剂
V021-N01830.definition: 以解表药为主组方，具有发汗、解肌、透疹等作用，治疗表证的方剂。

V021-N01941.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01941.label: 解表药
V021-N01941.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01941.definition: Medicines to release the exterior. They are indicated for exterior pattern. Based on the property and actions, these medicines are further categorized into two types: medicines to remove wind and dissipate cold and medicines to remove wind and clear heat.

V021-N01941.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01941.label: 解表药
V021-N01941.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01941.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01941.label: 解表药
V021-N01941.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类
V021-N01941.definition: 以发散表邪为主要功效，常用以治疗表证的药物，称解表药，又称发表药。

V021-N01941.label: 解表药
V021-N01941.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片

V021-N01831.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01831.label: 软膏
V021-N01831.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01831.definition: A viscous, semi-solid preparation for external application. It is made from fine medicinal powder and ointment bases.

V021-N01831.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01831.label: 软膏
V021-N01831.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01831.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V021-N01831.label: 软膏
V021-N01831.path: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）｜中医外科学｜外科学治疗
V021-N01831.definition: 将药物、药材细粉、药材提取物与适宜基质混合制成的半固体外用制剂。

V021-N01831.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01831.label: 软膏
V021-N01831.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜剂型｜膏剂
V021-N01831.definition: 由药物、药材细粉、药材提取物与适宜基质混合制成的半固体外用剂型，易于用涂抹皮肤或粘膜。

V021-N01831.label: 软膏
V021-N01831.path: 临床术语｜限定值｜剂型｜膏剂
V021-N01831.definition: 由药物、药材细粉、药材提取物与适宜基质混合制成的半固体外用剂型，易于用涂抹皮肤或粘膜。

V021-N01942.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01942.label: 辛凉解表药
V021-N01942.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01942.definition: Medicines that are pungent in flavour and cool in property. They mainly act to remove wind and clear heat and are indicated for wind heat exterior pattern. Some medicines can also clear the head/eyes, benefit the throat, promote skin eruption and stop coughing. These medicines can be used for wind heat-induced red, swollen and painful eyes, red, swollen throat, inhibited skin eruption, and cough due to wind heat.

V021-N01942.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01942.label: 辛凉解表药
V021-N01942.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜解表药

V021-N01942.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01942.label: 辛凉解表药
V021-N01942.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类｜解表药
V021-N01942.definition: 指味多辛苦而偏寒凉，以发散风热为主要功效，主要适用于风热感冒以及温病初起邪在卫分证的药物。

V021-N01942.label: 辛凉解表药
V021-N01942.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片｜解表药

V021-N01864.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01864.label: 辛凉解表药
V021-N01864.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01864.definition: Medicines that are pungent in flavour and cool in property. They mainly act to remove wind and clear heat and are indicated for wind heat exterior pattern. Some medicines can also clear the head/eyes, benefit the throat, promote skin eruption and stop coughing. These medicines can be used for wind heat-induced red, swollen and painful eyes, red, swollen throat, inhibited skin eruption, and cough due to wind heat.

V021-N01864.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01864.label: 发散风热药
V021-N01864.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜解表药

V021-N01864.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01864.label: 辛凉解表药
V021-N01864.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类｜解表药
V021-N01864.definition: 指味多辛苦而偏寒凉，以发散风热为主要功效，主要适用于风热感冒以及温病初起邪在卫分证的药物。

V021-N01943.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01943.label: 辛温解表药
V021-N01943.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01943.definition: Medicines that are pungent in flavour and warm in property. They mainly act to remove wind and dissipate cold and are indicated for wind cold exterior pattern. Some medicines can also remove wind, alleviate itching, relieve pain, stop coughing, promote urination to resolve oedema, and heal sores/ulcers. These medicines can be used for wind cold-induced itchy rashes, cough, oedema, sores/ulcers, and bi-impediment due to wind and dampness.

V021-N01943.definition: 指性味辛温，以发散肌表风寒邪气为主要作用，主治风寒表证的药物。

Some medicines can also remove wind, alleviate itching, relieve pain, stop coughing, promote urination to resolve oedema, and heal sores/ulcers. These medicines can be used for wind cold-induced itchy rashes, cough, oedema, sores/ulcers, and bi-impediment due to wind and dampness.

V021-N01945.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01945.label: 道地药材
V021-N01945.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01945.definition: High-quality Chinese medicines produced in specific geographical areas.

V021-N01945.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药

V021-N01945.definition: 是优质纯正药材的专用名词，是指历史悠久、产地适宜、品种优良、产量宏丰、炮制考究、疗效突出、带有地域特点的药材，又称道地药材。

V021-N01946.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01946.definition: The combination, according to Chinese medicine theory, of two or more medicines to achieve a pre-determined clinical outcome.

V021-N01947.label: 配伍禁忌
V021-N01947.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01947.definition: Combination of some medicines can reduce the curative effect, produce or enhance toxic or side-effects and/or affect the safety of medicines. These combinations should be avoided. Specifically, there are eighteen antagonisms and nineteen incompatibilities.

V021-N01947.definition: 中药配合应用，将出现毒副作用，或减低疗效等后果的用药禁忌。

V021-N01825.definition: A liquid form of herbal extracts prepared with distilled liquour.

V021-N01825.definition: 药材用蒸馏酒浸提成分而制得的澄清液体剂型。

V021-N01825.label: 酒剂
V021-N01825.definition: 药材用蒸馏酒浸提成分而制得的澄清液体剂型。

V021-N01950.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01950.label: 重镇安神药
V021-N01950.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01950.definition: Medicines (mostly minerals, fossil bones or shells) heavy in weight and downbearing in property. These medicines are indicated for excess mental uneasiness including palpitations, insomnia, convulsions, epilepsy or mania.

V021-N01950.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01950.label: 重镇安神药
V021-N01950.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜安神药

V021-N01950.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01950.label: 重镇安神药
V021-N01950.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类｜安神药
V021-N01950.definition: 指多为矿石、化石、介类药物，具有重镇安神、平惊定志、平肝潜阳等作用，主要用于治疗心火炽盛、阳气躁动、痰火扰心、肝郁化火及惊吓所致的心悸、失眠、多梦等心神不宁实证，惊风、癫痫、癫狂、肝阳上亢等证的药物。

V021-N01950.label: 重镇安神药
V021-N01950.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片｜安神药
V021-N01950.definition: 指多为矿石、化石、介类药物，具有重镇安神、平惊定志、平肝潜阳等作用，主要用于治疗心火炽盛、阳气躁动、痰火扰心、肝郁化火及惊吓所致的心悸、失眠、多梦等心神不宁实证，惊风、癫痫、癫狂、肝阳上亢等证的药物。

V021-N01733.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01733.label: 釜底抽薪
V021-N01733.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01733.definition: “Take away firewood from under the cauldron” is a metaphorical expression for the method of discharging heat with purgation. These formulas act to purge excess heat. A representative formula is Da Cheng Qi Tang (Major Purgative Decoction).

V021-N01755.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01755.label: 颗粒剂
V021-N01755.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01755.definition: Granulated preparations made by herbal extracts and an excipient or fine medicinal powder.

V021-N01755.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01755.label: 冲剂
V021-N01755.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01755.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂

V021-N01755.label: 颗粒剂
V021-N01755.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜剂型、煎服法
V021-N01755.definition: 曾称“冲剂”。将药材提取物与适宜的赋型 剂或药材细粉制成的颗粒状制剂。

V021-N01755.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01755.label: 冲剂
V021-N01755.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜剂型
V021-N01755.definition: 指将药材提取物与适宜的辅料或饮片细粉制成具有一定粒度的颗粒状制剂。规定的粒度范围是不能通过一号筛与五号筛的总和不得超过15%。

V021-N01755.label: 冲剂
V021-N01755.definition: 指将药材提取物与适宜的辅料或饮片细粉制成具有一定粒度的颗粒状制剂。规定的粒度范围是不能通过一号筛与五号筛的总和不得超过15%。

V021-N01838.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01838.label: 饮片
V021-N01838.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01838.definition: Prepared herbal pieces that can be used directly in clinical use or preparation production.

V021-N01838.label: 饮片
V021-N01838.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜中药学类｜炮制
V021-N01838.definition: 初步加工或经过炮制后达到质量标准，直接用于配方的中药。

V021-N01838.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01838.label: 饮片
V021-N01838.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜剂型
V021-N01838.definition: 将净选后的中药材，经过软化、切削、干燥等加工工序，制成一定规格的药材（如片、段、丝、块等），称为饮片。

V021-N01838.label: 饮片
V021-N01838.definition: 将净选后的中药材，经过软化、切削、干燥等加工工序，制成一定规格的药材（如片、段、丝、块等），称为饮片。

V021-N01839.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01839.label: 驱虫剂
V021-N01839.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01839.definition: Formulas to kill intestinal parasites/worms. They are indicated for intestinal parasites.

V021-N01839.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01839.label: 驱虫剂
V021-N01839.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜方剂｜其他方剂

V021-N01839.label: 驱虫剂
V021-N01839.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜方剂学类｜方剂分类
V021-N01839.definition: 以驱虫药物为主配伍组成，具有驱虫或杀虫 等作用，治疗人体寄生虫病方剂的统称。

V021-N01839.label: 驱虫剂
V021-N01839.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜方剂
V021-N01839.definition: 以驱虫药为主组方，具有驱虫、杀虫或安蛔作用，治疗人体寄生虫病的方剂。

V021-N01952.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01952.label: 驱虫药
V021-N01952.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜药物治疗类
V021-N01952.definition: Medicines to expel or kill parasites. They are indicated for intestinal parasites.

V021-N01952.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N01952.label: 驱虫药
V021-N01952.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜中药｜消食药

V021-N01952.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N01952.label: 驱虫药
V021-N01952.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TD[中药和方剂]｜中药｜中药功能分类
V021-N01952.definition: 指以驱除或杀灭人体内寄生虫为主要功效，用以治疗虫证的药物。

V021-N01952.label: 驱虫药
V021-N01952.path: 临床术语｜中药和方剂｜中药饮片

V021-N02816.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02816.label: 投火法
V021-N02816.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V021-N02816.definition: A method whereby an ignited paper is quickly flung into a cup to create a negative pressure on the selected area.

V021-N02816.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02816.label: 投火法
V021-N02816.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜治则治法

V021-N02816.label: 投火法
V021-N02816.path: 临床术语｜中医操作/方法｜治疗方法/操作｜其他疗法｜针灸疗法｜拔罐法｜火罐法
V021-N02816.definition: 将蘸酒精的棉球或折叠的软质白色片（卷）点燃后投入罐内，趁火旺时迅速将罐扣于应拔部位。

V021-N02814.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02814.label: 拔罐类
V021-N02814.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）

V021-N02820.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02820.label: 留罐法
V021-N02820.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V021-N02820.definition: Leave the cup in place after suction.

V021-N02820.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02820.label: 留罐
V021-N02820.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜治则治法

V021-N02820.label: 留罐
V021-N02820.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜针灸学类｜针灸疗法及其他
V021-N02820.definition: 拔罐后将罐留置一定时间。

V021-N02820.label: 留罐
V021-N02820.path: 临床术语｜中医操作/方法｜治疗方法/操作｜其他疗法｜针灸疗法｜拔罐法
V021-N02820.definition: 拔罐后将罐留置5－15分钟，使浅层皮肤和肌肉吸入罐内，轻者皮肤潮红，重者皮下瘀血紫黑。此法多用于深部组织损伤、颈肩腰腿痛、关节病变以及临床各科多种疾病。

V021-N02822.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02822.label: 药罐
V021-N02822.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V021-N02822.definition: A boiling cup method to boil bamboo cups in medicinal liquid and then apply to the body.

V021-N02822.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02822.label: 药罐
V021-N02822.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜治则治法

V021-N02822.label: 药罐
V021-N02822.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜针灸学类｜针灸疗法及其他
V021-N02822.definition: 拔罐前先将罐体（竹罐）放在药液中煮沸后 再应用的拔罐疗法。

V021-N02822.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02822.label: 药罐疗法
V021-N02822.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TE[中医诊断治疗技术和设备]｜治疗｜中医药疗法｜治法｜外治疗法｜拔罐疗法
V021-N02822.definition: 拔罐前先将罐体（竹罐）放在药液中煮沸后再应用的拔罐疗法。

V021-N02823.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02823.label: 贴棉法
V021-N02823.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V021-N02823.definition: A method to stick an alcoholic cotton ball on the inner wall (the lower 1/3), ignite the cotton ball and quickly place the cup over the selected area.

V021-N02823.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02823.label: 贴棉法
V021-N02823.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜治则治法

V021-N02823.label: 贴棉法
V021-N02823.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜针灸学类｜针灸疗法及其他
V021-N02823.definition: 用大小适宜的酒精棉一块，贴在罐内壁的下 1／3处，用火将酒精点燃后，迅速扣在施术部 位的火罐法。

V021-N02823.label: 贴棉法
V021-N02823.path: 临床术语｜中医操作/方法｜治疗方法/操作｜其他疗法｜针灸疗法｜拔罐法｜火罐法
V021-N02823.definition: 将直径约1－2cm的薄脱脂棉片略蘸酒精后贴于罐体内侧壁，点燃后迅速将罐扣于吸拔部位，此法亦用于身体侧面横向拔罐。

V021-N00633.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N00633.label: 赤白肉际
V021-N00633.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V021-N00633.definition: The boundary between the palmar aspect and dorsal aspect of the hands and feet. The skin on the palm aspect appears white, whereas the skin on the dorsal aspect appears red or brown. It is often used as an anatomical landmark to locate certain points.

V021-N02825.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02825.label: 闪火法
V021-N02825.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜治则、治法与疗法｜针灸类（含拔罐、刮痧）
V021-N02825.definition: A method to ignite an alcoholic cotton ball held with a forceps, place it inside the cup, quickly turn it around in one to two circles, take it out immediately, and place the cup on the selected area.

V021-N02825.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02825.label: 闪火法
V021-N02825.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜治则治法

V021-N02825.label: 闪火法
V021-N02825.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜针灸学类｜针灸疗法及其他
V021-N02825.definition: 将95％酒精的棉球点燃后，伸入罐内缓动片 刻，随即退出，迅速将罐回扣下的火罐法。

V021-N02825.label: 闪火法
V021-N02825.path: 临床术语｜中医操作/方法｜治疗方法/操作｜其他疗法｜针灸疗法｜拔罐法｜火罐法
V021-N02825.definition: 用镊子夹住略蘸酒精的棉球，或手持闪火器（用细铁丝将纱布缠绕于7－8号的粗铁丝的一端，将纱布蘸少许酒精），一手握罐体，将棉球或纱布点燃后立即伸入罐内闪火即退出，速将罐扣于应拔部位。此法适用于各部位，可拔留罐、闪罐、走罐等，临床最常用。

V021-N01353.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01353.label: 太阳人
V021-N01353.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜体质
V021-N01353.definition: According to the classification of yin and yang personality in Huangdi Neijing, an individual with a Taiyang personality shows more yang characteristics.

V021-N01354.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01354.label: 太阴人
V021-N01354.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜体质
V021-N01354.definition: According to the classification of yin and yang personality in Huangdi Neijing, an individual with a Taiyin personality shows more yin characteristics.

V021-N01356.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01356.label: 少阳人
V021-N01356.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜体质
V021-N01356.definition: According to the classification of yin and yang personality in Huangdi Neijing, an individual with a Shaoyang personality shows less yang characteristics.

V021-N01357.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N01357.label: 少阴人
V021-N01357.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜体质
V021-N01357.definition: According to the classification of yin and yang personality in Huangdi Neijing, an individual with a Shaoyin personality shows less yin characteristics.

V021-N02231.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02231.label: 四诊
V021-N02231.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语

V021-N02231.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02231.label: 四诊
V021-N02231.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02231.label: 四诊
V021-N02231.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02231.definition: 望、闻、问、切4种中医诊察疾病基本方法的合称。

V021-N02231.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02231.label: 四诊
V021-N02231.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TE[中医诊断治疗技术和设备]｜诊断｜中医诊断｜诊法
V021-N02231.definition: 指中医诊察疾病的四种基本方法，即望诊、闻诊、问诊、切诊。

V021-N02231.label: 四诊
V021-N02231.path: 临床术语｜中医操作/方法｜诊断方法/操作｜诊法
V021-N02231.definition: 四诊是中医临床的一项基本功，具体包括望诊、闻诊、问诊和切诊四个方面。

V021-N02236.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02236.label: 主色
V021-N02236.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02236.definition: The colour one was born with. It remains throughout life. It is determined by race and prenatal factors.

V021-N02236.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02236.label: 主色
V021-N02236.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02236.label: 主色
V021-N02236.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02236.definition: 人与生俱来的皮肤颜色。

V021-N02585.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02585.label: 乏力
V021-N02585.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02585.definition: Weariness of the body. In severe cases, individuals may experience difficulty lifting things or walking, coupled with drowsiness or lack of energy. Often results from qi deficiency or dampness.

V021-N02585.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02585.label: 乏力
V021-N02585.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02585.label: 乏力
V021-N02585.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02585.definition: 自觉肢体懈怠，软弱无力的表现。

V021-N02585.label: 神疲乏力
V021-N02585.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜不适
V021-N02585.definition: 自觉精神困倦，肢体懈怠，软弱无力的表现。

V021-N02587.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02587.label: 五心烦热
V021-N02587.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02587.definition: A feeling of restlessness and heat sensation in the chest, along with feverish sensations in the palms and soles. This is most commonly caused by heart blood deficiency, fire hyperactivity due to yin deficiency or internal retention of fire heat after recovery from medical conditions.

V021-N02587.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02587.label: 五心烦热
V021-N02587.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02587.label: 五心烦热
V021-N02587.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02587.definition: 自觉两手心、两足心发热及心胸发热的表现，可伴有心烦不宁，体温升高。

V021-N02587.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02587.label: 烦热
V021-N02587.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜体温变化｜发热
V021-N02587.definition: 指因发热而烦躁不安，坐卧不宁，或心胸烦闷，或五心烦热的症状。

V021-N02587.label: 五心烦热
V021-N02587.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜寒热｜但热不寒
V021-N02587.definition: 自觉两手心、两足心发热及心胸发热的表现，可伴有心烦不宁，体温升高。

V021-N02070.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02070.label: 代脉
V021-N02070.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊

V021-N02070.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02070.label: 代脉
V021-N02070.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02070.label: 代脉
V021-N02070.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02070.definition: 脉来缓弱而出现有规律的间歇的脉象。

V021-N02070.label: 代脉
V021-N02070.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜脉诊症状｜歇止脉
V021-N02070.definition: 脉来缓弱而出现有规律的间歇的脉象。

V021-N02071.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02071.label: 伏脉
V021-N02071.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02071.definition: A pulse that is difficult to feel and requires heavy pressure down to the bone. It indicates severe stagnation of pathogenic factors.

V021-N02071.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02071.label: 伏脉
V021-N02071.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02071.label: 伏脉
V021-N02071.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02071.definition: 脉位极深，好似在筋骨之间，需重按寻找才应指，甚则伏而不见的脉象。

V021-N02071.label: 伏脉
V021-N02071.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜脉诊症状
V021-N02071.definition: 脉位极深，好似在筋骨之间，需重按寻找才应指，甚则伏而不见的脉象。

V021-N02589.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02589.label: 但寒不热
V021-N02589.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02589.definition: Aversion to cold alone without fever is mostly seen in interior cold pattern that results from yang deficiency, cold binding the Wei-defensive qi or cold directly affecting the internal organs.

V021-N02589.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02589.label: 但寒不热
V021-N02589.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02589.label: 但寒不热
V021-N02589.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02589.definition: 只感觉寒冷，不感觉发热，体温也不升高的表现。

V021-N02589.label: 但寒不热
V021-N02589.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜寒热
V021-N02589.definition: 只感觉寒冷，不感觉发热，体温也不升高的表现。

V021-N02072.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02072.label: 促脉
V021-N02072.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02072.definition: A pulse that arrives as urgent and forceful but irregularly interrupted. It indicates excess heat, stagnation of qi, blood, phlegm-fluid retention or swelling/pain.

V021-N02072.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02072.label: 促脉
V021-N02072.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02072.label: 促脉
V021-N02072.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02072.definition: 脉来急促而有不规律的间歇的脉象。

V021-N02072.label: 促脉
V021-N02072.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜脉诊症状｜歇止脉
V021-N02072.definition: 脉来急促而有不规律的间歇的脉象。

V021-N02238.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02238.label: 假神
V021-N02238.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02238.definition: Sudden ‘better’ signs and symptoms in patients with chronic critical conditions: a sudden change from dull eyes with sluggish eyeballs to floating brightness in the eyes; a sudden change from mental unconsciousness or listlessness to clear consciousness and mental restlessness; a sudden change from reluctance to talk and low weak voice into a talkative, clear voice; a sudden change from a grey/dark complexion to flushed cheeks; and a sudden change from no appetite and low food intake into increased appetite and hunger. The false spirit indicates collapse of healthy qi, extreme essential qi failure of zang–fu organs or imminent separation between yin and yang. This is seen as an omen for a dying person.

V021-N02238.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02238.label: 假神
V021-N02238.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02238.label: 假神
V021-N02238.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02238.definition: 俗称“回光返照”。重危病人突然出现精神、食欲等暂时“好转”的虚假表现。

V021-N02238.label: 假神
V021-N02238.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜神志症状
V021-N02238.definition: 重危病人突然出现精神、食欲等暂时“好转”的虚假表现。

V021-N02594.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02594.label: 冷汗
V021-N02594.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02594.definition: A feeling of coldness after sweating. Most commonly caused by severe deficiency of yang qi.

V021-N02594.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02594.label: 冷汗
V021-N02594.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02594.label: 冷汗
V021-N02594.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02594.definition: 身体畏寒，四肢发凉，并伴有出汗的表现。

V021-N02594.label: 冷汗
V021-N02594.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜汗出异常
V021-N02594.definition: 身体畏寒，四肢发凉，并伴有出汗的表现。

V021-N02595.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02595.label: 冷痛
V021-N02595.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02595.definition: Pain with a cold sensation that alleviates with warmth and pressure but aggravates with cold. It is most commonly caused by cold affecting the meridians or yang qi failing to warm the zang–fu organs and limbs.

V021-N02595.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02595.label: 冷痛
V021-N02595.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02595.label: 冷痛
V021-N02595.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02595.definition: 疼痛伴有冷感，或疼痛部位的体表温度较正常皮肤发凉。

V021-N02595.label: 冷痛
V021-N02595.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜疼痛｜疼痛-按性质分
V021-N02595.definition: 疼痛伴有冷感，或疼痛部位的体表温度较正常皮肤发凉。

V021-N02075.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02075.label: 切诊
V021-N02075.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02075.definition: A diagnostic method to feel, touch, palpate and press certain areas of the body.

V021-N02075.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02075.label: 切诊
V021-N02075.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02075.label: 切诊
V021-N02075.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02075.definition: 医者用手指或手掌的触觉，对病人的脉和全身进行触、摸、按、压，以了解病情，诊察疾病的方法。

V021-N02075.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02075.label: 切诊
V021-N02075.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TE[中医诊断治疗技术和设备]｜诊断｜中医诊断｜诊法｜四诊
V021-N02075.definition: 四诊之一。包括脉诊和按诊，医者运用手和指端的感觉，对病人体表某些部位进行触摸按压的检查方法。检查内容如脉象的变化，胸腹的痞块，皮肤的肿胀，手足的温凉，疼痛的部位等。

V021-N02075.label: 切诊
V021-N02075.path: 临床术语｜中医操作/方法｜诊断方法/操作｜诊法｜四诊
V021-N02075.definition: 切诊分脉诊和按诊两部分，是医生用手对病人体表某些部位进行触、摸、按、压，从而获得病情资料的一种诊察方法。

V021-N02064.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02064.label: 切诊类
V021-N02064.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊

V021-N02596.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02596.label: 刺痛
V021-N02596.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02596.definition: Pain as if pricked by a needle. It is most commonly caused by stagnant blood.

V021-N02596.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02596.label: 刺痛
