V021-N02077.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02077.label: 单按
V021-N02077.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02077.definition: A pulse diagnosis method to feel the pulse on one hand with just one finger to differentiate the conditions of Cun, Guan and Chi pulses. For example, to lift the index and ring fingers while feeling the Guan position with the middle finger.

V021-N02077.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02077.label: 单按
V021-N02077.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02077.label: 单按
V021-N02077.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02077.definition: 用一个手指专按寸、关、尺中某一部位脉象的切脉方法。

V021-N02077.label: 单按
V021-N02077.path: 临床术语｜中医操作/方法｜诊断方法/操作｜诊法｜四诊｜切诊｜脉诊｜脉诊指法
V021-N02077.definition: 分别用一指单按其中一部脉象，重点体会某一部脉象的特征，称为单按。

V021-N02241.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02241.label: 厚苔
V021-N02241.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02241.definition: A tongue coating through which the underlying tongue surface is not visible, often indicating turbid dampness, phlegm, food retention or heat.

V021-N02241.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02241.label: 厚苔
V021-N02241.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02241.label: 厚苔
V021-N02241.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02241.definition: 舌苔增厚，不能见到舌质颜色的舌象。

V021-N02241.label: 厚苔
V021-N02241.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜舌诊症状｜舌苔症状｜苔质所见
V021-N02241.definition: 舌苔增厚，不能见到舌质颜色的舌象。

V021-N02078.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02078.label: 反关脉
V021-N02078.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02078.definition: A physiological variation of a normal pulse: the changes of the anatomic position of the radial artery shifts the pulse normally at the Cunkou region to the back of the wrist from the Chi position.

V021-N02078.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02078.label: 反关脉
V021-N02078.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02078.label: 反关脉
V021-N02078.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02078.definition: 桡动脉异行于腕关节背例而形成“反关”的脉位，属生理性变异。

V021-N02078.label: 反关脉
V021-N02078.path: 临床术语｜机体形态｜脉诊部位
V021-N02078.definition: 指一种生理变异的脉位。指挠动脉生于腕关节的背侧。故切脉位置也相应在寸口的背面。有同时见于两手的，或独见一手的。

V021-N02604.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02604.label: 口咸
V021-N02604.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02604.definition: A subjective salty sensation in the mouth. Sometimes individuals may experience salty salivation. Often results from deficiency cold or kidney heat.

V021-N02604.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02604.label: 口咸
V021-N02604.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02604.label: 口咸
V021-N02604.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02604.definition: 自觉口中有咸味的表现。

V021-N02604.label: 口咸
V021-N02604.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜饮食口味症状｜口味症状
V021-N02604.definition: 自觉口中有咸味的表现。

V021-N02605.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02605.label: 口干
V021-N02605.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02605.definition: A subjective feeling of insufficient saliva in the mouth. Often occurs when exuberant heat consumes or scorches bodily fluids.

V021-N02605.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V021-N02605.label: 口干
V021-N02605.path: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）｜中医耳鼻喉科学｜耳鼻喉科诊断
V021-N02605.definition: 口腔干燥、少津或无津的表现。

V021-N02605.label: 口干
V021-N02605.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02605.definition: 自觉口中津液不足，但没有饮水要求，或饮水很少的表现。

V021-N02605.label: 口干
V021-N02605.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜饮食口味症状｜饮食症状
V021-N02605.definition: 自觉口中津液不足，但没有饮水要求，或饮水很少的表现。

V021-N02607.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02607.label: 口涩
V021-N02607.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02607.definition: A subjective dry, puckering feeling in the mouth. Often results from stomach heat consuming fluids or wind phlegm obstructing the meridians.

V021-N02607.label: 口涩
V021-N02607.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜饮食口味症状｜口味症状

V021-N02608.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02608.label: 口淡
V021-N02608.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02608.definition: A diminished sensitivity of taste, with no pleasant flavour left after eating. Often occurs as a result of qi deficiency of the spleen and stomach.

V021-N02608.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02608.label: 口淡
V021-N02608.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02608.label: 口淡
V021-N02608.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02608.definition: 口中味觉减退，自觉口内发淡而品尝不出饮食滋味的表现。

V021-N02608.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02608.label: 口淡
V021-N02608.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜口味异常
V021-N02608.definition: 指口中无味，舌上味觉减退，无法尝出饮食滋味。

V021-N02608.label: 口淡
V021-N02608.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜饮食口味症状｜口味症状
V021-N02608.definition: 口中味觉减退，自觉口内发淡而品尝不出饮食滋味的表现。

V021-N02609.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02609.label: 口渴
V021-N02609.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02609.definition: A subjective feeling of dry mouth and thirst. Often occurs as a result of exuberant heat entering the Ying nutrients and blood, internal retention of water fluids, lung dryness consuming fluids, or fire hyperactivity due to yin deficiency.

V021-N02609.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02609.label: 口渴
V021-N02609.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02609.label: 口渴
V021-N02609.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02609.definition: 自觉口中干燥而欲饮水的表现。

V021-N02609.label: 口渴
V021-N02609.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜饮食口味症状｜饮食症状
V021-N02609.definition: 自觉口中干燥而欲饮水的表现。

V021-N02610.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02610.label: 口甜
V021-N02610.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02610.definition: A subjective sugary or honey-like sensation. Often results from damp heat in the spleen and stomach, damage to qi and yin or deficiency heat scorching spleen fluids.

V021-N02610.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02610.label: 口甜
V021-N02610.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02610.label: 口甜
V021-N02610.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02610.definition: 自觉口中有甜味的表现。

V021-N02610.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02610.label: 口甜
V021-N02610.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜口味异常

V021-N02610.label: 口甜
V021-N02610.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜饮食口味症状｜口味症状
V021-N02610.definition: 自觉口中有甜味的表现。

V021-N00246.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N00246.label: 口眼喎斜
V021-N00246.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N00246.definition: Deviation of the mouth and eyes is characterized by the deviation of the mouth corner towards the healthy side, facial muscle flaccidity on the affected side and muscle tension on the healthy side, and an inability to completely close the eye and mouth, frown or blow on the affected side. Often results from wind attacking the meridians or wind phlegm obstructing the meridians.

V021-N00246.label: 口眼喎斜
V021-N00246.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N00246.definition: 口服向一侧歪斜，患侧眼睛闭合困难，口中或有口水流出的表现。

V021-N00246.label: 口眼斜
V021-N00246.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜五官症状｜口唇症状
V021-N00246.definition: 口眼向一侧歪斜，患侧眼睛闭合困难，口中或有口水流出的表现

V021-N02613.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02613.label: 口苦
V021-N02613.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02613.definition: A subjective bitter sensation in the mouth. Often occurs when internal heat causes the bile to ascend.

V021-N02613.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02613.label: 口苦
V021-N02613.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02613.label: 口苦
V021-N02613.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02613.definition: 自觉口中有苦味的表现。

V021-N02613.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02613.label: 口苦
V021-N02613.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜口味异常

V021-N02613.label: 口苦
V021-N02613.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜饮食口味症状｜口味症状
V021-N02613.definition: 自觉口中有苦味的表现。

V021-N02614.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02614.label: 口酸
V021-N02614.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02614.definition: A subjective sour, vinegar-like sensation in the mouth. In severe cases, individuals may have a sour breath. Often results from ascending of liver heat, liver heat affecting the spleen or food retention.

V021-N02614.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02614.label: 口酸
V021-N02614.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02614.label: 口酸
V021-N02614.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02614.definition: 自觉口中有酸味或酸腐气味的表现。

V021-N02614.label: 口酸
V021-N02614.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜饮食口味症状｜口味症状
V021-N02614.definition: 自觉口中有酸味或酸腐气味的表现。

V021-N02615.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02615.label: 口麻
V021-N02615.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02615.definition: A subjective feeling of numbness inside the mouth. It is often caused by wind transformed from liver yang.

V021-N02615.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02615.label: 口麻
V021-N02615.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02615.label: 口麻
V021-N02615.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02615.definition: 口舌麻木，感觉减退的表现。

V021-N02615.label: 口不仁
V021-N02615.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜麻木

V021-N02620.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02620.label: 呵欠
V021-N02620.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02620.definition: A response to fatigue or sleepiness.

V021-N02620.label: 呵欠
V021-N02620.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02620.definition: 自觉困倦时不自觉地张口深呼吸的表现。

V021-N02620.label: 呵欠
V021-N02620.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜呼吸症状
V021-N02620.definition: 自觉困倦时不自觉地张口深呼吸的表现。

V021-N02620.label: 呵欠
V021-N02620.path: 临床术语｜诊察对象｜闻诊对象｜声音

V021-N02243.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02243.label: 命关
V021-N02243.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02243.definition: One of the diagnostic sites for infantile venule of the index finger. The life gate is the area between the third transverse crease and terminal segment of the index finger. It indicates a severe medical condition.

V021-N02243.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02243.label: 命关
V021-N02243.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02243.label: 命关
V021-N02243.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02243.definition: 小儿指纹食指端部分，位于食指第三指节，即第三节横纹至指端。

V021-N02244.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02244.label: 善色
V021-N02244.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02244.definition: An abnormal but lustrous complexion, indicating that essential qi of zang–fu organs remain sufficient and stomach qi can ascend to the face. It is often seen in acute, mild conditions or yang pattern that can be easily treated and have a favourable prognosis.

V021-N02244.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02244.label: 善色
V021-N02244.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02244.label: 善色
V021-N02244.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02244.definition: 在疾病过程中，面部颜色虽然异常，但光泽正常，提示预后尚好。

V021-N02631.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02631.label: 嗳气
V021-N02631.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02631.definition: The release of gas from the stomach through the mouth, often accompanied with burp sounds. Often results from weakness of the spleen and stomach or retention of phlegm, fire or food retention in the stomach, which causes stomach qi to ascend.

V021-N02631.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02631.label: 嗳气
V021-N02631.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02631.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02631.label: 噫气
V021-N02631.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02631.label: 嗳气
V021-N02631.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02631.definition: 气从胃中上逆，出咽喉而发出声响，声音长而缓的表现。

V021-N02631.label: 嗳气
V021-N02631.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜躯体症状｜胃脘症状
V021-N02631.definition: 气从胃中上逆，出咽喉而发出声响，声音长而缓的表现。

V021-N02634.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02634.label: 四肢拘急
V021-N02634.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02634.definition: Spasticity of the hands and feet with impaired flexion and extension. Often results from cold affecting the meridians or malnourishment of the extremities due to heat scorching yin fluids and resultant blood dryness.

V021-N02634.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02634.label: 四肢拘急
V021-N02634.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02634.label: 四肢拘急
V021-N02634.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02634.definition: 手足拘紧挛急，屈伸不利的表现。

V021-N02634.label: 四肢拘急
V021-N02634.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜形态症状｜姿态症状
V021-N02634.definition: 手足拘紧挛急，屈伸不利的表现。

V021-N00014.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N00014.label: 囟填
V021-N00014.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N00014.definition: A noticeable outward curve of the fontanel. Often occurs when pathogenic fire in febrile diseases ascends or when wind heat or damp heat affects the brain.

V021-N00014.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N00014.label: 囟填
V021-N00014.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜儿科病

V021-N00014.label: 囟门高突
V021-N00014.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N00014.definition: 小儿囟门高出头皮，呈突起之状的表现。

V021-N00014.label: 囟门高突
V021-N00014.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜小儿症状
V021-N00014.definition: 小儿囟门呈突起之状的表现。

V021-N00015.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N00015.label: 囟陷
V021-N00015.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N00015.definition: A sunken fontanel is characterised by a noticeable inward curve. It is often caused by vomiting, diarrhoea, deficiency of qi and blood, deficiency cold of the spleen and stomach, congenital maldevelopment. It is normal for an infant under 6 months of age to have a sunken fontanel.

V021-N00015.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N00015.label: 囟陷
V021-N00015.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜儿科病

V021-N02245.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02245.label: 地图舌
V021-N02245.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02245.definition: A tongue with irregular shedding of the coating and distinct demarcation between the shed and unshed areas, looking like a map, often indicating phlegm dampness due to qi deficiency or spleen deficiency coupled with parasitic worms.

V021-N02245.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02245.label: 地图舌
V021-N02245.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02245.label: 地图舌
V021-N02245.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02245.definition: 舌苔呈不规则的部分剥脱，暴露出舌质的颜色，舌面上有苔处与无苔处的界限清晰，形似地图的舌象。

V021-N02245.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02245.label: 剥光苔
V021-N02245.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜舌象异常｜舌苔异常
V021-N02245.definition: 舌苔部分脱落，脱落处光滑无苔，称为剥苔；舌苔剥落殆尽，舌面光滑如镜，称为镜面舌。

V021-N02245.label: 剥苔
V021-N02245.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜舌诊症状｜舌苔症状｜苔质所见
V021-N02245.definition: 舌苔全部或部分剥脱，剥落处光滑无苔，暴露出舌质颜色的舌象。

V021-N02636.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02636.label: 壮热
V021-N02636.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02636.definition: Persistent high-grade fever (>39℃) often results from internal exuberant yang heat steaming the surface of the body upon pathogenic factors entering the interior.

V021-N02636.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02636.label: 壮热
V021-N02636.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02636.label: 壮热
V021-N02636.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02636.definition: 感觉躁热难受，体温升高明显，身热灼手，或伴有恶热烦渴的表现。

V021-N02636.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02636.label: 壮热
V021-N02636.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜体温变化｜发热
V021-N02636.definition: 病人自觉热甚，或恶热，喜弃衣被，扪之肌肤烙手，测其体温39℃以上者，多因外邪入里，邪正相搏，阳热内盛，蒸达于外所致。常见于外感温热病气分阶段，属里实热证，多兼面赤、汗多、烦渴饮冷、舌红苔黄等热盛之症。

V021-N02636.label: 壮热
V021-N02636.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜寒热｜但热不寒
V021-N02636.definition: 感觉躁热难受，体温升高明显，身热灼手，或伴有恶热烦渴的表现。

V021-N02638.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02638.label: 多梦
V021-N02638.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02638.definition: Interrupted sleep by strange dreams or frightening nightmares. Individuals often have a clear memory of the dreams. Often results from hyperactivity of liver yang, deficiency of qi and blood or yin deficiency of the liver and kidney.

V021-N02638.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02638.label: 多梦
V021-N02638.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02638.label: 多梦
V021-N02638.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02638.definition: 睡眠不实，睡眠中梦扰纷乱，醒后感觉头昏神疲的表现。

V021-N02638.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02638.label: 多梦
V021-N02638.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜神经病学表现
V021-N02638.definition: 指睡眠不实，睡眠中梦扰纷乱，醒后感觉头昏神疲的症状。

V021-N02638.label: 多梦
V021-N02638.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜睡眠症状
V021-N02638.definition: 睡眠不实，睡眠中梦扰纷乱，醒后感觉头昏神疲的表现。

V021-N02080.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02080.label: 大脉
V021-N02080.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02080.definition: A pulse that is broad and can be felt on all three fingers. It indicates pathogenic factors prevailing over anti-pathogenic qi. A large, forceful pulse indicates an excess heat pattern; whereas a large, weak pulse indicates a deficiency pattern or loss of qi.

V021-N02080.label: 大脉
V021-N02080.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜脉诊症状
V021-N02080.definition: 属脉象异常。指粗大满指的脉象。大而有力主实证、热证，大而无力主虚证。

V021-N02645.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02645.label: 太息
V021-N02645.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02645.definition: An act of exhaling audibly in a long deep breath, as in weariness or relief. Often results from emotional disturbance and liver qi stagnation.

V021-N02645.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02645.label: 太息
V021-N02645.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02645.label: 太息
V021-N02645.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02645.definition: 呼气为主的深呼吸，出声长叹的表现。

V021-N02645.label: 太息
V021-N02645.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜呼吸症状
V021-N02645.definition: 呼气为主的深呼吸，出声长叹的表现。

V021-N02645.label: 太息
V021-N02645.path: 临床术语｜诊察对象｜闻诊对象｜声音

V021-N02246.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02246.label: 失神
V021-N02246.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02246.definition: Dull eyes with sluggish eyeballs, listlessness or unconsciousness, apathetic expression, slow response, a grey/dark complexion lacking lustre, weight loss and difficult body movements. The loss of spirit indicates severe damage to healthy qi and essential qi failure of zang–fu organs.

V021-N02246.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02246.label: 失神
V021-N02246.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02246.label: 失神
V021-N02246.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02246.definition: 人精神萎靡，神情恍惚，目光呆滞，反应迟钝，言语低微，面色无华，肌肉瘦削，或二便失禁等生命活动衰败的表现。

V021-N02246.label: 失神
V021-N02246.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜神志症状
V021-N02246.definition: 人精神萎靡，神情恍惚，目光呆滞，反应迟钝，言语低微，面色无华，肌肉瘦削，或二便失禁等生命活动衰败的表现。

V021-N02649.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02649.label: 头汗
V021-N02649.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02649.definition: Excessive sweating on the face and head. Often occurs when retained pathogenic heat ascends to heat the head and face.

V021-N02649.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02649.label: 头汗
V021-N02649.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02649.label: 头汗
V021-N02649.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02649.definition: 仅头面部或头颈部多汗的表现。

V021-N02649.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02649.label: 头汗
V021-N02649.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜汗证｜局部出汗
V021-N02649.definition: 仅头部或头颈部汗出较多。

V021-N02649.label: 头汗
V021-N02649.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜汗出异常
V021-N02649.definition: 仅头面部或头颈部多汗的表现。

V021-N02651.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02651.label: 头重
V021-N02651.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02651.definition: Headache with a subjective heavy, bearing down sensation or feeling like being wrapped up in a towel. It is most commonly caused by external dampness, phlegm dampness, pestilence qi, or kidney qi deficiency.

V021-N02651.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02651.label: 头重
V021-N02651.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02651.label: 头重
V021-N02651.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法

V021-N02651.label: 头重
V021-N02651.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜头面症状｜头部症状

V021-N02653.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02653.label: 头项强痛
V021-N02653.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02653.definition: Pain, contracture and discomfort in the head and neck. Often occurs when wind cold affecting the surface of the body or impaired qi flow of Taiyang meridian.

V021-N02653.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02653.label: 头项强痛
V021-N02653.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02653.label: 头项强痛
V021-N02653.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02653.definition: 头痛，伴有颈项部的肌肉拘紧、僵硬，甚至疼痛。

V021-N02653.label: 头项强痛
V021-N02653.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜疼痛｜疼痛-按部位分｜头痛
V021-N02653.definition: 头痛，伴有颈项部的肌肉拘紧、僵硬，甚至疼痛。

V021-N02654.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02654.label: 完谷不化
V021-N02654.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02654.definition: Presence of undigested food in stools. Often results from deficiency cold of the spleen and stomach or vital fire decline due to kidney deficiency.

V021-N02654.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02654.label: 完谷不化
V021-N02654.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02654.label: 完谷不化
V021-N02654.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02654.definition: 粪便中夹有大量未消化食物的腹泻表现。

V021-N02654.label: 完谷不化
V021-N02654.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜二便症状｜大便症状
V021-N02654.definition: 粪便中夹有大量未消化食物的腹泻表现。

V021-N02081.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02081.label: 实脉
V021-N02081.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02081.definition: A pulse that is forceful at all three regions using different pressure. It indicates an excess pattern.

V021-N02081.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02081.label: 实脉
V021-N02081.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02081.label: 实脉
V021-N02081.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02081.definition: 寸关尺三部脉象浮、中、沉取均搏动有力的脉象。

V021-N02081.label: 实脉
V021-N02081.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜脉诊症状
V021-N02081.definition: 寸关尺三部脉象浮、中、沉取均搏动有力的脉象。

V021-N02247.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02247.label: 客色
V021-N02247.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02247.definition: The colour one takes on when physiological, seasonal, climactic, geographic, diet and emotions change the colouring.

V021-N02247.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02247.label: 客色
V021-N02247.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02247.label: 客色
V021-N02247.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02247.definition: 主要是因季节、气候所造成的肤色，重点是面色的改变，也包括因气候、情绪、剧烈运动等因素导致的面色变化。

V021-N02656.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02656.label: 寒战
V021-N02656.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02656.definition: A feeling of coldness or shivering. Often results from extreme cold or blocked heat.

V021-N02656.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02656.label: 寒战
V021-N02656.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02656.label: 寒战
V021-N02656.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02656.definition: 感觉寒冷的同时伴有全身不由自主的颤抖的表现。

V021-N02656.label: 寒战
V021-N02656.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜寒热｜但寒不热
V021-N02656.definition: 感觉寒冷的同时伴有全身不由自主的颤抖的表现。

V021-N02658.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02658.label: 寒热往来
V021-N02658.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊

V021-N02658.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02658.label: 寒热往来
V021-N02658.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02658.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02658.label: 往来寒热
V021-N02658.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02658.label: 寒热往来
V021-N02658.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02658.definition: 恶寒与发热交替发作，恶寒时不发热，发热时不恶寒的表现。

V021-N02658.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02658.label: 寒热往来
V021-N02658.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜体温变化｜发热
V021-N02658.definition: 是指恶寒与发热交替发作，又称为往来寒热，是邪正相争、互为进退的病理表现。

V021-N02658.label: 寒热往来
V021-N02658.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜寒热
V021-N02658.definition: 恶寒与发热交替发作，恶寒时不发热，发热时不恶寒的表现。

V021-N02082.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02082.label: 寸关尺
V021-N02082.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02082.definition: The three sections over the radial artery for feeling the pulse. Specifically, the Guan position is central to the styloid process at the wrist, where the tip of the physician’s middle finger is placed; the Chi position is next to it on the distal aspect where the tip of the physicians’ index finger is placed; and the Cun position is on the proximal aspect where the tip of the physicians’ ring finger is placed.

V021-N02082.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02082.label: 寸关尺
V021-N02082.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02082.label: 寸关尺
V021-N02082.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02082.definition: 寸口脉诊法中三个诊脉部位：烧骨茎突内侧处为关；关之前（脱端）为寸；关之后（肘端）为尺。三部的脉搏，分别称寸脉、关脉、尺脉。

V021-N02084.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02084.label: 寸口诊法
V021-N02084.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02084.definition: A diagnostic method used to feel the pulse at the Cunkou area located at the medial aspect of the styloid process where the radial artery pulsates. The Cunkou area is divided into Cun, Guan and Chi positions. Each position is further divided into superficial, intermediate and deep depths. This method is known as three positions and three regions and nine positions in Cunkou area.

V021-N02084.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02084.label: 寸口诊法
V021-N02084.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02084.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02084.label: 寸口诊法
V021-N02084.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TE[中医诊断治疗技术和设备]｜诊断｜中医诊断｜诊法｜四诊｜切诊｜脉诊｜仲景三部诊法
V021-N02084.definition: 是指单独切按桡动脉的搏动形象，以推测人体生理、病理状况的一种诊察方法。

V021-N02084.label: 寸口诊法
V021-N02084.path: 临床术语｜中医操作/方法｜诊断方法/操作｜诊法｜四诊｜切诊｜脉诊
V021-N02084.definition: 寸口诊法始见于《内经》，详于《难经》，推广于晋代王叔和的《脉经》。诊脉独取寸口的原理，一是寸口脉为手太阴肺经原穴太渊所在之处，十二经脉之气汇聚于此，故称“脉之大会”；二是肺朝百脉，因而寸口脉气能够反映五脏六腑的气血状况；三是寸口在腕后，此处肌肤薄弱，脉易暴露，切按方便。

V021-N02662.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02662.label: 小便涩痛
V021-N02662.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02662.definition: Difficulty passing urine accompanied with a painful sensation. Often occurs when damp heat flows downward to the urinary bladder.

V021-N02662.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02662.label: 小便涩痛
V021-N02662.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02662.label: 小便涩痛
V021-N02662.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02662.definition: 小便排出不畅，排尿时感觉尿道疼痛的表现。

V021-N02662.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02662.label: 尿痛
V021-N02662.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜疼痛

V021-N02662.label: 尿痛
V021-N02662.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜疼痛｜疼痛-按部位分｜二便疼痛
V021-N02662.definition: 排尿时感觉尿道疼痛的表现。

V021-N02666.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02666.label: 小便频数
V021-N02666.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02666.definition: Increased frequency in passing of urine. If often occurs when 1) kidney yang fails to perform qi transformation of the urinary bladder; 2) the spleen fails to transport and transform water; 3) the lung fails to regulate water passage; and/or 4) liver qi stagnation affects the urinary bladder.

V021-N02666.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02666.label: 小便频数
V021-N02666.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02666.label: 尿频
V021-N02666.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病

V021-N02666.label: 小便频数
V021-N02666.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02666.definition: 小便次数明显增多，甚则一日达数十次的表现。

V021-N02666.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02666.label: 尿频
V021-N02666.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜排尿障碍

V021-N02666.label: 小儿尿频
V021-N02666.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V021-N02666.definition: 尿频是小儿常见的一种泌尿系疾病，以小便频急而数为特征。小儿尿频的发生分内因和外因两个方面。外因责之于湿热，多因外感湿热，或坐地潮湿、粪便污染感受湿热邪毒，或因有积滞内蕴化为湿热；内因责之于脾肾亏虚，多由先天禀赋不足，素体虚弱，或后天失调，导致脾肾气虚。尿频的病位在肾与膀胱。

V021-N02666.label: 尿频
V021-N02666.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜二便症状｜小便症状
V021-N02666.definition: 小便次数明显增多，甚则一日达数十次的表现。

V021-N02667.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02667.label: 小便黄赤
V021-N02667.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02667.definition: Urine that is more yellow than usual and sometimes appears reddish. Often results from internal heat or damp heat.

V021-N02667.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02667.label: 小便黄赤
V021-N02667.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02667.label: 小便黄赤
V021-N02667.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02667.definition: 尿液的颜色呈深黄、黄红或黄褐色，甚至尿如浓茶的表现。

V021-N02667.label: 小便短黄
V021-N02667.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜二便症状｜小便症状
V021-N02667.definition: 尿液的颜色呈深黄、黄红或黄褐色，甚至尿如浓茶的表现。

V021-N02248.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02248.label: 少神
V021-N02248.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02248.definition: Dull eyes with sluggish eyeballs, poor spirit, slow response, a complexion lacking lustre, flabby muscle and slow body movements. The insufficiency of spirit indicates insufficiency of healthy qi or mild impairment to essential qi of zang–fu organs.

V021-N02248.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02248.label: 少神
V021-N02248.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02248.label: 少神
V021-N02248.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜神志症状
V021-N02248.definition: 临床表现为两目晦涩，目光乏神，面色少华，暗淡不容，精神不振，思维迟钝，少气懒言，肌肉松软，动作迟缓。提示精气不足，机能减退，多见于虚证患者或疾病恢复期病人。

V021-N02086.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02086.label: 布指
V021-N02086.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02086.definition: Positioning of fingers in pulse examination. Generally, a doctor places the middle finger of the right hand to feel the Guan position of a patient’s left hand, the index finger to feel the Cun position, the ring finger to feel the Chi position, and adjust the distances between the fingers according to the patient’s height.

V021-N02086.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02086.label: 布指
V021-N02086.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02086.label: 布指
V021-N02086.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02086.definition: 诊脉时，医生根据病人的身高分布三个手指的安放位置。

V021-N02086.label: 布指
V021-N02086.path: 临床术语｜中医操作/方法｜诊断方法/操作｜诊法｜四诊｜切诊｜脉诊｜脉诊指法
V021-N02086.definition: 布指是诊脉的第一步，布指的要领可以概括为三指平齐，用指目按脉脊，中指定关，三指疏密适宜。

V021-N02087.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02087.label: 平脉
V021-N02087.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02087.definition: A pulse that can be felt at all three regions, with a frequency of 4–5 beats (60–75 beats per minute (bpm)) in one breath. It is neither superficial nor deep. It is relaxed, smooth, soft, forceful and rhythmic. It is marked by the three essential elements: stomach qi, spirit and root.

V021-N02087.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02087.label: 平脉
V021-N02087.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02087.label: 平脉
V021-N02087.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02087.definition: 正常脉象，特点为：脉势和缓，往来从容，节律均匀，柔和有力，一息四五至（相当于每分钟6090次）。

V021-N02087.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02087.label: 平脉
V021-N02087.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TG[中医药学及其相关学科]｜中医基础理论｜脉象
V021-N02087.definition: 正常脉象，特点为：脉势和缓，往来从容，节律均匀，柔和有力，一息四五至（相当于每分钟60～90次）。

V021-N02087.label: 平脉
V021-N02087.path: 临床术语｜原理和经验｜原理｜诊断原理｜正常脉象
V021-N02087.definition: 又称常脉。即正常的脉。亦即脉来有胃气、有神、有根。;即辨别脉象。

V021-N02087.label: 平脉
V021-N02087.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜脉诊症状
V021-N02087.definition: 正常脉象，特点为：脉势和缓，往来从容，节律均匀，柔和有力，一息四五至（相当于每分钟60～90次）。

V021-N02088.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02088.label: 弦脉
V021-N02088.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02088.definition: A pulse that feels straight, long and tense, like the feeling of pressing a tight string of a musical instrument. It indicates liver/gallbladder problems, pain, wind, or phlegm-fluid retention.

V021-N02088.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02088.label: 弦脉
V021-N02088.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02088.label: 弦脉
V021-N02088.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02088.definition: 端直而长，指下挺然，如按琴弦的脉象。

V021-N02088.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02088.label: 弦脉
V021-N02088.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜脉象异常
V021-N02088.definition: 端直而长，如按琴弦，脉势较强而硬。主肝胆病，诸痛，痰饮，疟疾。

V021-N02088.label: 弦脉
V021-N02088.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜脉诊症状
V021-N02088.definition: 端直而长，指下挺然，如按琴弦的脉象。

V021-N02089.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02089.label: 弱脉
V021-N02089.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02089.definition: A pulse that feels thready, soft, deep and weak. It indicates deficiency of qi and blood.

V021-N02089.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02089.label: 弱脉
V021-N02089.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02089.label: 弱脉
V021-N02089.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法

V021-N02089.label: 弱脉
V021-N02089.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜脉诊症状

V021-N02250.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02250.label: 得神
V021-N02250.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02250.definition: Bright eyes with flexible eyeballs, clear consciousness, natural facial expressions, a moist lustrous face, a fit body, smooth body movements, and even breathing. The presence of spirit indicates abundant essential qi or a mild medical condition.

V021-N02250.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02250.label: 得神
V021-N02250.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02250.label: 得神
V021-N02250.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02250.definition: 人精神饱满，目光灵活，反应灵敏，语言清晰，面色润泽，呼吸平稳，脉象和缓有力等生命活动正常的表现。

V021-N02250.label: 得神
V021-N02250.path: 临床术语｜原理和经验｜原理｜藏象学说原理｜神明情志｜神明
V021-N02250.definition: 即有神气。神是生命活动现象的总称，是五脏精气的体现。有神气表示疾病较易治疗。

V021-N02250.label: 得神
V021-N02250.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜神志症状
V021-N02250.definition: 人精神饱满，目光灵活，反应灵敏，语言清晰，面色润泽，呼吸平稳，脉象和缓有力等生命活动正常的表现。

V021-N02091.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02091.label: 微脉
V021-N02091.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02091.definition: A pulse that is extremely thin, soft and barely palpable. It may be felt and then sometimes is lost. It indicates deficiency of yin, yang, qi and blood.

V021-N02091.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02091.label: 微脉
V021-N02091.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02091.label: 微脉
V021-N02091.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02091.definition: 极细极软，若有若无，按之欲绝的脉象。

V021-N02091.label: 微脉
V021-N02091.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜脉诊症状
V021-N02091.definition: 极细极软，若有若无，按之欲绝的脉象。

V021-N02092.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02092.label: 怪脉
V021-N02092.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02092.definition: A pulse that has no root (stomach qi). Often occurs in later stage of critical conditions, indicating qi exhaustion of zang–fu organs and collapse of stomach qi.

V021-N02092.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02092.label: 怪脉
V021-N02092.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02092.label: 怪脉
V021-N02092.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02092.definition: 生命垂危时出现的无胃、神、根的各种怪异脉象，占有“十怪脉”“七绝脉”之说。

V021-N02092.label: 真脏脉
V021-N02092.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜脉诊症状
V021-N02092.definition: 五脏真气败露的脉象，即无胃、神、根的脉象。

V021-N02111.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02111.label: 怪脉
V021-N02111.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02111.definition: A pulse that has no root (stomach qi). Often occurs in later stage of critical conditions, indicating qi exhaustion of zang–fu organs and collapse of stomach qi.

V021-N02111.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02111.label: 真脏脉
V021-N02111.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02111.label: 真脏脉
V021-N02111.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02111.definition: 五脏真气败露的脉象，即无胃、神、根的脉象。

V021-N02111.label: 真脏脉
V021-N02111.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜脉诊症状
V021-N02111.definition: 五脏真气败露的脉象，即无胃、神、根的脉象。

V021-N02093.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02093.label: 总按
V021-N02093.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02093.definition: A method of pulse diagnosis where the three fingers are simultaneously positioned on the wrist to feel the pulse in Cun, Guan and Chi positions.

V021-N02093.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02093.label: 总按
V021-N02093.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02093.label: 总按
V021-N02093.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02093.definition: 三个手指同时按寸、关、尺三部的切脉方法。

V021-N02093.label: 总按
V021-N02093.path: 临床术语｜中医操作/方法｜诊断方法/操作｜诊法｜四诊｜切诊｜脉诊｜脉诊指法
V021-N02093.definition: 三指平布，同时用力按脉，称为总按 。

V021-N02686.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02686.label: 恶寒
V021-N02686.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02686.definition: A subjective feeling of coldness that cannot be resolved by putting on more clothes or staying closer to a source of warmth. Often occurs as a result of contracting external cold.

V021-N02686.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02686.label: 恶寒

V021-N02686.label: 恶寒
V021-N02686.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02686.definition: 感觉怕冷，虽加衣覆被，采取保暖措施，身体发冷的感觉仍不能缓解的表现。

V021-N02686.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02686.label: 恶寒
V021-N02686.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜体温变化
V021-N02686.definition: 怕冷，虽加衣被或近火取暖仍不缓解。

V021-N02686.label: 恶寒

V021-N02686.definition: 感觉怕冷，虽加衣覆被，采取保暖措施，身体发冷的感觉仍不能缓解的表现。

V021-N02687.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02687.label: 恶寒发热
V021-N02687.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02687.definition: Concurrent aversion to cold and fever is a key proof in diagnosing an exterior pattern.

V021-N02687.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02687.label: 恶寒发热
V021-N02687.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02687.label: 恶寒发热
V021-N02687.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02687.definition: 恶寒与发热同时并作的表现。

V021-N02687.label: 恶寒发热
V021-N02687.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜寒热
V021-N02687.definition: 恶寒与发热同时并作的表现。

V021-N02688.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02688.label: 恶心
V021-N02688.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02688.definition: A sensation of unease and discomfort in the upper stomach with an involuntary urge to vomit. Often results from cold, heat, dampness, phlegm or food stagnation.

V021-N02688.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02688.label: 恶心
V021-N02688.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02688.label: 恶心
V021-N02688.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02688.definition: 感觉胃中有物上拱，急迫欲吐的表现，常是呕吐的先兆。

V021-N02688.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02688.label: 恶心
V021-N02688.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征
V021-N02688.definition: 感觉胃中有物上拱，急迫欲吐的症状，常是呕吐的先兆。

V021-N02688.label: 恶心
V021-N02688.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜躯体症状｜胃脘症状
V021-N02688.definition: 感觉胃中有物上拱，急迫欲吐的表现，常是呕吐的先兆。

V021-N02251.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02251.label: 恶色
V021-N02251.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02251.definition: A grey/dark withered complexion, indicating essential qi failure of zang–fu organs and failure of stomach qi to ascend to the face. It is often seen in chronic, critical conditions or yin pattern that can be difficult to deal with and have an unfavourable prognosis.

V021-N02251.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02251.label: 恶色
V021-N02251.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02251.label: 恶色
V021-N02251.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02251.definition: 面色枯槁晦暗，没有光泽，提示预后不佳。

V021-N02251.label: 真脏色
V021-N02251.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜头面症状｜面部症状｜面色所见

V021-N02690.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02690.label: 恶风
V021-N02690.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02690.definition: A subjective feeling of coldness when exposed to wind and the feeling is alleviated by staying away from wind. Often occurs as a result of qi deficiency or exposure to pathogenic wind.

V021-N02690.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02690.label: 恶风
V021-N02690.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02690.label: 恶风
V021-N02690.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02690.definition: 遇风则怕冷不适，甚至战慄，避风则缓的表现。

V021-N02690.label: 恶风
V021-N02690.path: 临床术语｜病因病机｜病因｜外感病因｜六淫｜风邪
V021-N02690.definition: 指病邪，来徐去疾，上虚下实，为恶风。

V021-N02690.label: 恶风
V021-N02690.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜寒热｜但寒不热
V021-N02690.definition: 遇风则怕冷不适，甚至战慄，避风则缓的表现。

V021-N02691.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02691.label: 战汗
V021-N02691.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02691.definition: A cycle of sudden coldness followed by shivering and sweating. Often seen in fierce struggle between healthy qi and pathogenic factors in externally contracted febrile conditions.

V021-N02691.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02691.label: 战汗
V021-N02691.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02691.label: 战汗
V021-N02691.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02691.definition: 寒战后全身大汗出的表现。

V021-N02691.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02691.label: 战汗
V021-N02691.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜汗证
V021-N02691.definition: 先全身恶寒、颤栗，接着大汗出者。

V021-N02691.label: 战汗
V021-N02691.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜汗出异常
V021-N02691.definition: 寒战后全身大汗出的表现。

V021-N02692.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02692.label: 手足厥冷
V021-N02692.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊

V021-N02692.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02692.label: 厥逆
V021-N02692.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02692.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02692.label: 手足厥冷
V021-N02692.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02692.label: 手足厥逆
V021-N02692.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02692.definition: 手足冰冷，甚至冷至肘、膝部的表现。

V021-N02692.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02692.label: 厥逆
V021-N02692.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V021-N02692.definition: 手足冰冷，甚至冷至肘、膝部的表现。

V021-N02692.label: 四肢厥冷
V021-N02692.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜寒热｜但寒不热｜四肢不温

V021-N02693.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02693.label: 手足心汗
V021-N02693.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02693.definition: Excessive sweating in the palms and soles. Often results from internal heat due to yin deficiency, exuberant Yangming heat or damp heat in the middle jiao.

V021-N02693.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02693.label: 手足心汗
V021-N02693.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02693.label: 手足心汗
V021-N02693.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02693.definition: 仅手心、足心部位多汗潮湿的表现。

V021-N02693.label: 手足心汗
V021-N02693.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜汗出异常｜手足汗
V021-N02693.definition: 仅手心、足心部位多汗潮湿的表现。

V021-N02694.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02694.label: 手足心热
V021-N02694.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02694.definition: Feverish sensations in the palms and soles are most commonly caused by internal heat due to yin deficiency or internal retention of fire heat.

V021-N02694.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02694.label: 手足心热
V021-N02694.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02694.label: 手足心热
V021-N02694.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02694.definition: 医生察知病人手心、足心发热，或病人自觉手、足心发热的表现。

V021-N02694.label: 手足心热
V021-N02694.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜寒热｜但热不寒
V021-N02694.definition: 医生察知病人手心、足心发热，或病人自觉手、足心发热的表现。

V021-N02094.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02094.label: 指法
V021-N02094.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02094.definition: The positioning of the fingers in pulse diagnosis. First, to locate the Guan (medial aspect of the styloid process) position with the middle finger; then, to locate the Cun (anterior to Guan) position with the index finger and the Chi (posterior to Guan) position with the ring finger. The three fingers are slightly flexed, presenting the shape of an arc. The fingertips are kept on the same horizontal level and the pulse is felt with the palmar aspects of the fingers.

V021-N02094.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02094.label: 指法
V021-N02094.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02095.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02095.label: 指目
V021-N02095.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02095.definition: Refers to the area between fingertips and finger pulps, and the middle part connecting the two corners of the fingernails.

V021-N02095.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02095.label: 指目
V021-N02095.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02097.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02097.label: 按诊
V021-N02097.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02097.definition: A method to directly touch or press certain areas of the body to feel the local temperature, moistness, softness, tenderness, lumps or other abnormal changes, and thus to determine the location, nature and severity of the pathology.

V021-N02097.label: 按诊
V021-N02097.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02097.definition: 医生用手对病人体表进行触、摸、按、压，以诊察了解病情的诊断方法。

V021-N02097.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02097.label: 按诊
V021-N02097.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TE[中医诊断治疗技术和设备]｜诊断｜中医诊断｜诊法｜四诊｜切诊
V021-N02097.definition: 是对病人的肌肤、手足、脘腹及其它病变部位，施行触摸按压，以测知局部冷热、软硬、压痛、痞块或其它异常变化，从而推断疾病的部位和性质的一种诊察方法。

V021-N02097.label: 按诊
V021-N02097.path: 临床术语｜中医操作/方法｜诊断方法/操作｜诊法｜四诊｜切诊
V021-N02097.definition: 按诊是医生用手触、摸、推、按病人的肌肤、胸腹、手足及其它病变部位，从局部的冷热、润燥、软硬、疼痛、痞块及其它异常表现，以了解病情的一种诊察方法。

V021-N02097.label: 压诊
V021-N02097.path: 临床术语｜原理和经验｜原理｜针灸原理｜经络原理｜经络临床应用｜经络诊断｜经络诊断方法｜经络触诊
V021-N02097.definition: 又称按诊。指用按压循摄等手法，寻找经络穴位上的异常变化，以协助诊断的方法。

V021-N02701.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02701.label: 掣痛
V021-N02701.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02701.definition: Pain that occurs in one part of the body but perceives in some other parts of the body. It is most commonly caused by blockage or malnourishment of meridians.

V021-N02701.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02701.label: 掣痛
V021-N02701.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02701.label: 掣痛
V021-N02701.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02701.definition: 疼痛处有抽搐感，同时牵引它处。

V021-N02701.label: 掣痛
V021-N02701.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜疼痛｜疼痛-按性质分
V021-N02701.definition: 人体关节或肌肉疼痛如同牵拉欲断裂一样。其一，阳虚骨痹证，其证机是病者夙体阳气虚弱，复感风寒湿侵袭骨节筋脉，气血阻滞不通；其治当温阳散寒，通利关节，以甘草附子汤。其二，经络病证，其三，妇人杂病错综复杂证机。

V021-N02099.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02099.label: 散脉
V021-N02099.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02099.definition: A pulse that feels superficial without root. With light pressure, it is irregularly and chaotic. With heavy pressure, it is impalpable. It indicates critical conditions with dispersion of Yuan-primordial qi.

V021-N02099.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02099.label: 散脉
V021-N02099.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02099.label: 散脉
V021-N02099.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02099.definition: 散而不聚，轻按有分散零乱且无力之感，重按则触不到脉动的脉象。

V021-N02099.label: 散脉
V021-N02099.path: 临床术语｜机体形态｜经络｜络脉｜十六络脉｜十五络脉｜足太阴络脉
V021-N02099.definition: 足太阳之别络。出《素问·刺腰痛篇》。以其散行而上，故称。

V021-N02099.label: 散脉
V021-N02099.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜脉诊症状
V021-N02099.definition: 散而不聚，轻按有分散零乱且无力之感，重按则触不到脉动的脉象。

V021-N02100.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02100.label: 数脉
V021-N02100.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02100.definition: A pulse with more than 5 beats in one breath (>75 bpm). It indicates a heat pattern. Specifically, a rapid, forceful pulse indicates an excess heat pattern; whereas a rapid, weak pulse indicates a deficiency heat pattern.

V021-N02100.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02100.label: 数脉
V021-N02100.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02100.label: 数脉
V021-N02100.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02100.definition: 脉来急速，一息五至以上（相当于每分钟90次以上）的脉象。

V021-N02100.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02100.label: 数脉
V021-N02100.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜脉象异常
V021-N02100.definition: 脉率增块，即一息五至以上（相当于每分钟脉搏90次以上）。主热证，有力为实热，无力为虚热。

V021-N02100.label: 数脉
V021-N02100.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜脉诊症状
V021-N02100.definition: 脉来急速，一息五至以上（相当于每分钟90次以上）的脉象

V021-N02101.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02101.label: 斜飞脉
V021-N02101.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02101.definition: A physiological variation of a normal pulse: the changes of the anatomic position of the radial artery shifts the pulse normally at the Cunkou region to the dorsum of the hand from the Chi position.

V021-N02101.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02101.label: 斜飞脉
V021-N02101.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02101.label: 斜飞脉
V021-N02101.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02101.definition: 桡动脉从尺部斜向桡骨茎突背侧、合谷方向延伸而形成“斜飞”的脉位，属生理性变异。

V021-N02702.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02702.label: 无汗
V021-N02702.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02702.definition: Absence of sweating in an exterior pattern is most commonly caused by external wind cold blocking the skin pores; and absence of sweating in an interior pattern is most commonly caused by yang qi failing to steam and transform yin fluids or insufficient generation of fluids and blood.

V021-N02702.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02702.label: 无汗
V021-N02702.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02702.label: 无汗
V021-N02702.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02702.definition: 没有出汗，指当汗出而不汗出的表现。

V021-N02702.label: 无汗
V021-N02702.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜汗出异常
V021-N02702.definition: 没有出汗，指当汗出而不汗出的表现。

V021-N02703.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02703.label: 日晡潮热
V021-N02703.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02703.definition: Noticeable or more pronounced fever from 3 pm to 5 pm. Most commonly seen in heat accumulating in the stomach and large intestine.

V021-N02703.label: 日晡潮热
V021-N02703.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02703.definition: 每至下午3时至5时左右体温升高，或热势加重的表现。

V021-N02703.label: 日晡潮热
V021-N02703.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜寒热｜但热不寒｜潮热
V021-N02703.definition: 每至下午3时至5时左右体温升高，或热势加重的表现。

V021-N02259.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02259.label: 望诊
V021-N02259.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02259.definition: A method to understand patients’ health condition by observing changes in their body, localized body parts, and excreta.

V021-N02259.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02259.label: 望诊
V021-N02259.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02259.label: 望诊
V021-N02259.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02259.definition: 用视觉观察病人的神、色、形、态、舌象、排泄物、小儿指纹等的异常变化，以了解病情的诊断方法。

V021-N02259.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02259.label: 望诊
V021-N02259.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TE[中医诊断治疗技术和设备]｜诊断｜中医诊断｜诊法｜四诊
V021-N02259.definition: 望诊是医生运用视觉观察病人的神色形态、局部表现、舌象、分泌物和排泄物色质的变化来诊察病情的方法。

V021-N02259.label: 望诊
V021-N02259.path: 临床术语｜中医操作/方法｜诊断方法/操作｜诊法｜四诊
V021-N02259.definition: 望诊，是医生运用视觉观察病人的全身和局部表现、舌象及排出物等，以收集病情资料的诊察方法。

V021-N02234.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02234.label: 望诊类
V021-N02234.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊

V021-N02260.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02260.label: 染苔
V021-N02260.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02260.definition: A tongue coating that is stained, often by food or medicine. A stained coating often resolves spontaneously within a short period of time.

V021-N02260.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02260.label: 染苔
V021-N02260.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02260.label: 染苔
V021-N02260.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02260.definition: 因被食物或药物的颜色所染，出现了虚假苔色的舌象。

V021-N02260.label: 染苔
V021-N02260.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜舌诊症状｜舌苔症状｜苔色症状
V021-N02260.definition: 因被食物或药物的颜色所染，出现了虚假苔色的舌象。

V021-N02708.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02708.label: 梦游
V021-N02708.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02708.definition: A phenomenon of getting out of bed, walking about or performing other activities during an apparent state of sleep. This may last minutes to hours. Sleepwalkers then come back to bed and return to sleep. They often have little or no memory of the incident. Contributing factors include disharmony between yin and yang, insufficiency of Ying nutrients and blood, deficiency of qi and yin, phlegm turbidity, fire heat, or stagnant blood.

V021-N02708.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02708.label: 梦游
V021-N02708.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02708.label: 梦游
V021-N02708.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02708.definition: 在睡梦中无意识地起床行走，或从事某些活动，醒来对此一无所知的表现。

V021-N02708.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02708.label: 梦行症
V021-N02708.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TF[中医精神疾病和心理学]｜中医精神疾病｜睡眠障碍
V021-N02708.definition: 指人在睡眠中无意识地起来完成某些动作，如行走、上房、劳作等。

V021-N02708.label: 梦行症
V021-N02708.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜精神情志病类

V021-N02708.label: 梦游
V021-N02708.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜睡眠症状
V021-N02708.definition: 在睡梦中无意识地起床行走，或从事某些活动，醒来对此一无所知的表现。

V021-N02261.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02261.label: 歪斜舌
V021-N02261.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02261.definition: A tongue that inclines to one side when extended, often indicating wind attacking the meridians or wind phlegm obstructing the meridians.

V021-N02261.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02261.label: 歪斜舌
V021-N02261.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02261.label: 歪斜舌
V021-N02261.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜舌诊症状｜舌态症状
V021-N02261.definition: 伸舌时舌体偏向一侧，或左或右。

V021-N02262.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02262.label: 气关
V021-N02262.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02262.definition: One of the diagnostic sites for infantile venule of the index finger. The qi gate is the area between the second and third transverse creases. It indicates a relatively severe condition.

V021-N02262.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02262.label: 气关
V021-N02262.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02262.label: 气关
V021-N02262.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02262.definition: 小儿指纹的中间部分，位于食指第二节，即第二节横纹至第三节横纹之间。

V021-N02102.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02102.label: 沉脉
V021-N02102.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02102.definition: A pulse that is difficult to feel with light or moderate pressure but can be felt on heavy pressure. It indicates an interior pattern. Specifically, a deep, forceful pulse indicates an interior excess pattern; whereas a deep, weak pulse indicates an interior deficiency pattern.

V021-N02102.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02102.label: 沉脉
V021-N02102.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02102.label: 沉脉
V021-N02102.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02102.definition: 脉位深，轻取不能应指，重按才显现于指下的脉象。

V021-N02102.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02102.label: 沉脉
V021-N02102.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜脉象异常
V021-N02102.definition: 轻取不应，重按始得，其脉位深沉。

V021-N02102.label: 沉脉
V021-N02102.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜脉诊症状
V021-N02102.definition: 脉位深，轻取不能应指，重按才显现于指下的脉象。

V021-N02103.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02103.label: 洪脉
V021-N02103.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02103.definition: A pulse that is broad, large and forceful like roaring waves that crash onto the shore powerfully and slowly fade away. Often indicates an excess heat pattern.

V021-N02103.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02103.label: 洪脉
V021-N02103.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02103.label: 洪脉
V021-N02103.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02103.definition: 脉来极大，如波涛汹涌，来盛去衰的脉象。

V021-N02103.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02103.label: 洪脉
V021-N02103.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜脉象异常
V021-N02103.definition: 脉体宽大，充实有力，状若波涛汹涌，来盛去衰。

V021-N02103.label: 洪脉
V021-N02103.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜脉诊症状
V021-N02103.definition: 脉来极大，如波涛汹涌，来盛去衰的脉象。

V021-N02104.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02104.label: 浮脉
V021-N02104.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊

V021-N02104.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02104.label: 浮脉
V021-N02104.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02104.label: 浮脉
V021-N02104.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02104.definition: 脉位表浅，轻取应指明显，重按则脉力稍减但不空虚的脉象。

V021-N02104.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02104.label: 浮脉
V021-N02104.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜脉象异常
V021-N02104.definition: 轻取即得、重按稍减而不空。其脉位浅表。

V021-N02104.label: 浮脉
V021-N02104.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜脉诊症状
V021-N02104.definition: 脉位表浅，轻取应指明显，重按则脉力稍减但不空虚的脉象。

V021-N02714.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02714.label: 消谷善饥
V021-N02714.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02714.definition: A symptom of increased appetite and food intake but recurrence of hunger sensation shortly after eating. Often results from excessive heat in the spleen and stomach.

V021-N02714.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02714.label: 消谷善饥
V021-N02714.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02714.label: 消谷善饥
V021-N02714.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02714.definition: 食欲亢进，进食量多，易感饥饿的表现。

V021-N02714.label: 消谷善饥
V021-N02714.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜饮食口味症状｜饮食症状
V021-N02714.definition: 食欲亢进，进食量多，易感饥饿的表现。

V021-N02105.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02105.label: 涩脉
V021-N02105.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02105.definition: A pulse that feels stagnant and obstructive, like a knife scraping bamboo. It indicates consumption of essence, blood/fluids insufficiency, or qi stagnation and blood stasis.

V021-N02105.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02105.label: 涩脉
V021-N02105.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02105.label: 涩脉
V021-N02105.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02105.definition: 脉来不流利，往来艰涩，如轻刀刮竹的脉象。

V021-N02105.label: 涩脉
V021-N02105.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜脉诊症状
V021-N02105.definition: 脉来不流利，往来艰涩，如轻刀刮竹的脉象。

V021-N02264.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02264.label: 淡白舌
V021-N02264.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02264.definition: A tongue less red than normal, indicating yang deficiency or deficiency of qi and blood.

V021-N02264.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02264.label: 淡白舌
V021-N02264.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02264.label: 淡白舌
V021-N02264.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02264.definition: 舌体颜色浅淡，缺乏血色的舌象。

V021-N02264.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02264.label: 淡白舌
V021-N02264.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜舌象异常｜舌色异常
V021-N02264.definition: 比淡红舌更浅淡，舌色红少白多。

V021-N02264.label: 淡白舌
V021-N02264.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜舌诊症状｜舌色症状
V021-N02264.definition: 舌体颜色浅淡，缺乏血色的舌象。

V021-N02265.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02265.label: 淡红舌
V021-N02265.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02265.definition: A lustrous tongue of normal colour, indicating disharmony between qi and blood. It is often seen in healthy person. In patients, a pale red tongue indicates a mild condition.

V021-N02265.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02265.label: 淡红舌
V021-N02265.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02265.label: 淡红舌
V021-N02265.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02265.definition: 舌体颜色淡红，如舌质润泽红活，则为正常舌象。

V021-N02265.label: 淡红舌
V021-N02265.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜舌诊症状｜舌色症状
V021-N02265.definition: 舌体颜色淡红润泽的舌象。

V021-N02780.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02780.label: 湿温潮热
V021-N02780.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02780.definition: Noticeable fever in the afternoon and inhibited fever (absence of hot sensation on initial palpation but presence of a burning sensation upon palpating for a while). Most commonly seen in damp heat accumulating in the spleen and stomach.

V021-N02780.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02780.label: 身热不扬
V021-N02780.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02780.label: 身热不扬
V021-N02780.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02780.definition: 身热稽留而热象不剧，或医生初扪病人体表不觉热甚，久则感到热盛灼手的表现。

V021-N02780.label: 身热不扬
V021-N02780.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜寒热｜但热不寒
V021-N02780.definition: 身热稽留而热象不剧，或医生初扪病人体表不觉热甚，久则感到热盛灼手的表现。

V021-N02717.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02717.label: 溏结不调
V021-N02717.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02717.definition: Irregular bowel movements are characterized by alternating loose and dry stools. They often result from liver stagnation coupled with spleen deficiency or qi deficiency of the spleen and stomach.

V021-N02717.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02717.label: 溏结不调
V021-N02717.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02106.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02106.label: 滑脉
V021-N02106.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02106.definition: A pulse that feels smooth like pearls rolling on a dish. Beats come and go fluently and smoothly, feeling slick to the fingers. It indicates phlegm-fluid retention, indigestion and excess heat. Physiologically, it can be considered as a normal pulse. It can also be seen in healthy people or women during pregnancy, indicating abundant and harmonious qi and blood.

V021-N02106.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02106.label: 滑脉
V021-N02106.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02106.label: 滑脉

V021-N02266.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02266.label: 滑苔
V021-N02266.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02266.definition: A moist tongue coating with excessive fluid, feels slippery, often indicating internal accumulation of water dampness.

V021-N02266.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02266.label: 滑苔
V021-N02266.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02266.label: 滑苔
V021-N02266.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02266.definition: 舌面水液过多，甚至伸舌涎流欲滴，扪之湿而滑利的舌象。

V021-N02266.label: 滑苔
V021-N02266.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜舌诊症状｜舌苔症状｜苔质所见
V021-N02266.definition: 舌苔润滑。热病苔滑，主里热内结，津液未伤。舌淡而苔白滑或见及滑，主阴寒凝滞、痰湿内阻。

V021-N02720.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02720.label: 潮热
V021-N02720.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02720.definition: Fever that recurs or aggravates at a regular time of each day like tide. Often occurs as a result of yang excess, yin deficiency or blood deficiency.

V021-N02720.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02720.label: 潮热
V021-N02720.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02720.label: 潮热
V021-N02720.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02720.definition: 发热盛衰起伏有定时，犹如潮汛的表现。包括午后潮热、日哺潮热等。

V021-N02720.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02720.label: 潮热

V021-N02720.definition: 发热盛衰起伏有定时，犹如潮汛的表现。包括午后潮热、日晡潮热等。

V021-N02720.label: 潮热

V021-N02720.definition: 发热盛衰起伏有定时，犹如潮汛的表现。包括午后潮热、日哺潮热等。

V021-N02107.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02107.label: 濡脉
V021-N02107.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02107.definition: A pulse that is superficial, thready and can be felt with light pressure but indistinct upon heavy pressure. It indicates loss of yin blood or dampness.

V021-N02107.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02107.label: 濡脉

V021-N02107.label: 濡脉
V021-N02107.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02107.definition: 浮而细软，轻取可以触知，重接反不明显的脉象。

V021-N02107.label: 濡脉
V021-N02107.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜脉诊症状
V021-N02107.definition: 浮而细软，轻取可以触知，重按反不明显的脉象。

V021-N02267.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02267.label: 灰苔
V021-N02267.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02267.definition: A tongue coating grey in colour, often indicating exuberant pathogenic heat, internal yin cold or a build up of phlegm dampness.

V021-N02267.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02267.label: 灰苔

V021-N02267.label: 灰苔

V021-N02267.label: 灰苔
V021-N02267.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜舌诊症状｜舌苔症状｜苔色症状

V021-N02722.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02722.label: 灼痛
V021-N02722.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02722.definition: Pain with a burning sensation that alleviates with cold. It is most commonly caused by pathogenic fire-heat or fire hyperactivity due to yin deficiency.

V021-N02722.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02722.label: 灼痛
V021-N02722.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02722.label: 灼痛
V021-N02722.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02722.definition: 疼痛伴有灼热感，或疼痛部位的体表温度较正常皮肤发热。

V021-N02722.label: 灼痛
V021-N02722.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜疼痛｜疼痛-按性质分
V021-N02722.definition: 疼痛伴有灼热感，或疼痛部位的体表温度较正常皮肤发热。

V021-N02268.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02268.label: 点刺舌
V021-N02268.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02268.definition: A tongue with red or purple red spots as well as thorn-like protrusions on its surface, often indicating extreme heat in zang–fu organs or exuberant heat in the blood phase.

V021-N02268.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02268.label: 点刺舌
V021-N02268.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02268.label: 芒刺舌
V021-N02268.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜舌诊症状｜舌形症状
V021-N02268.definition: 舌乳头突起如刺，摸之棘手的舌象。

V021-N02723.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02723.label: 烦热
V021-N02723.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02723.definition: Typical clinical symptoms are vexation, fever, restlessness or oppressive, feverish sensations. They are often caused by hyperactivity of liver fire and fire hyperactivity due to yin deficiency.

V021-N02723.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02723.label: 烦热
V021-N02723.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜体温变化｜发热
V021-N02723.definition: 指因发热而烦躁不安，坐卧不宁，或心胸烦闷，或五心烦热的症状。

V021-N02723.label: 烦热
V021-N02723.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜寒热｜但热不寒

V021-N02270.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02270.label: 燥苔
V021-N02270.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02270.definition: A tongue coating that looks dry and feels dry to the touch, often indicating consumption of bodily fluids.

V021-N02270.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02270.label: 燥苔
V021-N02270.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02270.label: 燥苔
V021-N02270.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02270.definition: 苔面缺乏津液，苔质干燥，扪之燥涩的舌象。

V021-N02270.label: 燥苔
V021-N02270.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜舌诊症状｜舌苔症状｜苔质所见
V021-N02270.definition: 苔面缺乏津液，苔质干燥，扪之燥涩的舌象。

V021-N02108.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02108.label: 牢脉
V021-N02108.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02108.definition: A pulse that feels deep, excessive, string-taut and long. It is indistinct on light or moderate pressure but stable on heavy pressure. It indicates internal cold, perhaps hernia and abdominal masses.

V021-N02108.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02108.label: 牢脉
V021-N02108.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02108.label: 牢脉
V021-N02108.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02108.definition: 脉位深，轻取、中取均不应指，重按可得脉体宽大、脉位长，脉来有力而弦的脉象。

V021-N02108.label: 牢脉
V021-N02108.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜脉诊症状
V021-N02108.definition: 脉位深，轻取、中取均不应指，重按可得脉体宽大、脉位长，脉来有力而弦的脉象。

V021-N02724.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02724.label: 狂言
V021-N02724.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02724.definition: Mentally deranged, wild, illogical talk and unreasonable behaviours such as singing or walking without any clothes on, often resulting from qi stagnation transforming into fire or phlegm fire disturbing the heart mind.

V021-N02724.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02724.label: 狂言
V021-N02724.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02724.label: 狂言
V021-N02724.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02724.definition: 语无伦次，狂躁妄语，精神错乱的表现。

V021-N02724.label: 狂言
V021-N02724.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜言语症状
V021-N02724.definition: 语无伦次，狂躁妄语，精神错乱的表现。

V021-N02725.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02725.label: 独语
V021-N02725.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02725.definition: Talking to oneself repeatedly but stopping with the presence of others, often resulting from qi and blood failing to nourish the heart mind or turbid phlegm misting the heart mind.

V021-N02725.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02725.label: 独语
V021-N02725.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02725.label: 独语
V021-N02725.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02725.definition: 神志清醒而喃喃自语，见人语止，精神障碍的表现。

V021-N02725.label: 独语
V021-N02725.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜言语症状
V021-N02725.definition: 神志清醒而喃喃自语，见人语止，精神障碍的表现。

V021-N02726.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02726.label: 畏寒
V021-N02726.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02726.definition: A subjective feeling of coldness that can be alleviated by putting on more clothes or blankets or staying closer to a source of warmth. Often occurs as a result of yang qi failing to warm the body or cold directly affecting the zang–fu organs or meridians.

V021-N02726.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02726.label: 畏寒
V021-N02726.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02726.label: 畏寒
V021-N02726.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02726.definition: 自觉怕冷，加衣被或近火取暖，采取保暖措施，身体发冷的感觉可以缓解的表现。

V021-N02726.label: 畏寒
V021-N02726.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜寒热｜但寒不热
V021-N02726.definition: 自觉怕冷，加衣被或近火取暖，采取保暖措施，身体发冷的感觉可以缓解的表现。

V021-N00127.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N00127.label: 疹
V021-N00127.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N00127.definition: Red, raised, bumpy millet-sized skin rashes. They often result from heat accumulating in the lung and stomach and exuberant heat in the Ying nutrients and blood affecting the skin.

V021-N00127.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N00127.label: 疹
V021-N00127.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N00127.label: 疹
V021-N00127.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N00127.definition: 发生于皮肤表面的斑丘状、粟粒状高出皮肤的疹子，抚之碍手，疹色可与皮肤颜色相同，亦可发红，疏密不一，甚则融连成片。

V021-N02109.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02109.label: 疾脉
V021-N02109.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02109.definition: A pulse that arrives swiftly and has a faster rate than a rapid pulse. It indicates acute febrile conditions, exhaustion of yin and impending exhaustion of Yuan-primordial qi.

V021-N02109.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02109.label: 疾脉
V021-N02109.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02109.label: 疾脉
V021-N02109.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02109.definition: 脉来急疾，一息七八至（相当于每分钟140次以上）的脉象。

V021-N02109.label: 疾脉
V021-N02109.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜脉诊症状
V021-N02109.definition: 脉来急疾，一息七八至（相当于每分钟140次以上）的脉象。

V021-N02110.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02110.label: 病脉
V021-N02110.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02110.definition: Pulses that are not normal or beyond physiological variations of a normal pulse.

V021-N02110.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02110.label: 病脉
V021-N02110.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02110.label: 病脉
V021-N02110.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02110.definition: 疾病时出现的异常脉象的统称。

V021-N02272.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02272.label: 病色
V021-N02272.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02272.definition: Abnormal changes in both colour and lustre of the face under a morbid state.

V021-N02272.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02272.label: 病色
V021-N02272.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02272.label: 病色
V021-N02272.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02272.definition: 由疾病造成的面色及全身肤色变化。

V021-N02273.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02273.label: 痿软舌
V021-N02273.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02273.definition: A tongue that is flabby and cannot move easily, often indicating malnourishment of the sinews or muscles due to deficiency of qi and blood or loss of yin fluids.

V021-N02273.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02273.label: 痿软舌
V021-N02273.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02273.label: 痿软舌
V021-N02273.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜舌诊症状｜舌态症状
V021-N02273.definition: 舌体软弱，无力伸缩，痿废不用。

V021-N02274.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02274.label: 瘦薄舌
V021-N02274.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02274.definition: A tongue thinner and smaller than normal, often indicating deficiency of qi and blood or fire hyperactivity due to yin deficiency.

V021-N02274.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02274.label: 瘦薄舌
V021-N02274.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02274.label: 瘦薄舌
V021-N02274.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法

V021-N02274.label: 瘦薄舌
V021-N02274.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜舌诊症状｜舌形症状
V021-N02274.definition: 舌体比正常舌瘦小而薄。

V021-N02276.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02276.label: 白苔
V021-N02276.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02276.definition: A tongue coating white in colour. A normal tongue coating is often seen in the middle and back part of the tongue with even, moist granules.

V021-N02737.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM

V021-N02737.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02737.definition: Blurred vision is a sensation of losing sharpness of the eyesight and feeling the objects out of focus. Often results from deficiency of liver blood and kidney essence or ascending of liver yang or wind fire that carries turbid phlegm.

V021-N02737.definition: 自觉眼前发黑，视物昏花晃动，看不清楚的表现。

V021-N02737.label: 目眩
V021-N02737.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法

V021-N02277.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02277.label: 真脏色
V021-N02277.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02277.definition: A withered, lustreless facial complexion. Often results from essential qi exhaustion of the five zang organs.

V021-N02277.label: 真脏色

V021-N02277.definition: 五脏精气败露的颜色，其色显露而枯槁无华。

V021-N02277.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜头面症状｜面部症状｜面色所见

V021-N02278.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02278.label: 短缩舌
V021-N02278.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02278.definition: A tongue that cannot be fully extended from the mouth and appears to be shortened. It is often seen in combination with a flaccid tongue, often indicating a critical condition.

V021-N02278.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02278.label: 短缩舌
V021-N02278.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02278.label: 短缩舌

V021-N02278.definition: 舌体卷短、紧缩，不能伸长，甚者伸舌难于抵齿。

V021-N02112.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02112.label: 短脉
V021-N02112.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02112.definition: A pulse that cannot reach its location or range. It can be felt most clearly at the Guan position, more indistinct at the Cun and the Chi positions. A short, forceful pulse indicates qi stagnation; whereas a short, weak pulse indicates qi deficiency.

V021-N02112.label: 短脉
V021-N02112.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02112.label: 短脉
V021-N02112.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02112.definition: 脉体不足正常的寸关尺三部位置，惟关部应指明显的脉象。

V021-N02112.label: 短脉
V021-N02112.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜脉诊症状
V021-N02112.definition: 脉体不足正常的寸关尺三部位置，惟关部应指明显的脉象。

V021-N02113.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02113.label: 离经脉
V021-N02113.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02113.definition: A pulse with one beat or three beats in one breath. It is often seen in a pregnant woman about to give birth.

V021-N02113.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02113.label: 离经脉
V021-N02113.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02113.label: 离经脉
V021-N02113.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02113.definition: （1）过快（相当于每分钟超过108次）或过慢（相当于每分钟不足36次）的脉象；（2）孕妇将分娩而出现的速率加快的脉象。

V021-N02113.label: 离经脉
V021-N02113.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜脉诊症状

V021-N02741.definition: Pain with a hollow sensation. It is most commonly caused by qi, blood, essence and blood failing to nourish the tissues and organs

V021-N02742.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02742.label: 窜痛
V021-N02742.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02742.definition: Pain that migrates from one area to another area. Wandering pain in the rib area, stomach and abdomen is often associated with liver qi stagnation, whereas wandering joint pain is often associated with wind.

V021-N02742.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02742.label: 窜痛

V021-N02742.label: 窜痛
V021-N02742.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02742.definition: 疼痛部位走窜不定，病人可感觉到疼痛的窜动。

V021-N02743.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02743.label: 筋惕肉瞤
V021-N02743.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02743.definition: A symptom of short spastic muscle contraction. Often results from malnourishment of muscles or sinews due to blood deficiency or consumption of body fluids. It may also occur when cold dampness damage yang and fail to transform water and qi.

V021-N02743.definition: 筋肉不由自主地跳动的表现。

V021-N02743.label: 筋惕肉瞤

V021-N02744.definition: A symptom of no desire to eat food, decreased food intake, tasteless or not feeling hungry. Often results from dampness affecting the spleen or the spleen failing to transport and transform.

V021-N02118.label: 缓脉

V021-N02118.definition: A pulse with about 4 beats in one breath (60 bpm). The beats come and go slowly. It indicates dampness, weakness of the spleen and stomach, or low ability to energize the pulse due to qi deficiency.

V021-N02118.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V021-N02118.label: 缓脉
V021-N02118.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V021-N02118.label: 缓脉
V021-N02118.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02118.definition: 一息四至，来去怠缓的脉象。若脉来和缓均匀为平脉;若脉来弛缓无力为病脉。

V021-N02118.label: 缓脉
V021-N02118.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜脉诊症状
V021-N02118.definition: 一息四至，来去怠缓的脉象。若脉来和缓均匀为平脉；若脉来弛缓无力为病脉。

V021-N02118.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V021-N02118.label: 缓脉
V021-N02118.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜切诊类
V021-N02118.definition: a pulse with four beats to one cycle of the physician’s respiration, even and harmonious in its form

V021-N02747.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V021-N02747.label: 耳痛
V021-N02747.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V021-N02747.definition: Pain in the auricles or within the ear canal. Often results from deficiency fire or wind heat affecting the liver and gallbladder meridians.

V021-N02747.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V021-N02747.label: 耳痛
V021-N02747.path: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）｜中医耳鼻喉科学｜耳鼻喉科诊断

V021-N02747.label: 耳痛
V021-N02747.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V021-N02747.definition: 耳内疼痛，病变部位可在耳郭、外耳道、鼓膜等。

V021-N02747.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V021-N02747.label: 耳痛
V021-N02747.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜疼痛
V021-N02747.definition: 耳内疼痛的症状，病变部位可在耳廓、外耳道，鼓膜等。

V021-N02747.label: 耳痛
V021-N02747.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜疼痛｜疼痛-按部位分｜面部疼痛
V021-N02747.definition: 耳内疼痛，病变部位可在耳郭、外耳道、鼓膜等。
